# 实验20.3.15：RNN/LSTM

import numpy as np

print('='*60)
print('实验20.3.15：RNN/LSTM实践')
print('='*60)

np.random.seed(42)

def rnn_cell(x, h, Wx, Wh, b):
    return np.tanh(x @ Wx + h @ Wh + b)

hidden = 16
input_sz = 8
Wx = np.random.randn(input_sz, hidden) * 0.1
Wh = np.random.randn(hidden, hidden) * 0.1
b = np.zeros(hidden)

seq = [np.random.randn(input_sz) for _ in range(10)]
h = np.zeros(hidden)
states = []

for t, x in enumerate(seq):
    h = rnn_cell(x.reshape(1,-1), h.reshape(1,-1), Wx, Wh, b).flatten()
    states.append(h)

print('序列长度:', len(seq))
print('初始状态范数:', round(np.linalg.norm(states[0]), 4))
print('最终状态范数:', round(np.linalg.norm(states[-1]), 4))

# 分析
changes = [np.linalg.norm(states[i] - states[i-1]) for i in range(1, len(seq))]
print('平均状态变化:', round(np.mean(changes), 6))

print()
print('实验20.3.15完成!')
LSTM如何解决梯度消失？
门控机制+细胞状态直通=CEC恒误差流。遗忘门控制信息保留。
GRU vs LSTM？
GRU=合并遗忘+输入门=更简洁。LSTM=更多门=更强表达力。GRU更快、参数少。
Transformer为何取代RNN？
并行化训练、长程依赖好、无序列限制。多头注意力捕获丰富关系。
推荐视频：RNN/LSTM教程

深度学习RNN/LSTM核心理论实践。

点击观看视频

Transformer

21.1 注意力机制

实验15题 | 理论3题 | 实验占比83% | 3小时
实验21.1.1：Self-Attentioneasy
目标
  • 掌握Self-Attention的核心方法
  • 理解相关算法的数学原理
  • 应用于实际ML问题
要求
  • 编写完整的实现代码
  • 进行结果验证和分析
  • 对比不同方法的性能和效果
Python 
# 实验21.1.1：Transformer

import numpy as np

print('='*60)
print('实验21.1.1：Transformer实践')
print('='*60)

np.random.seed(42)

def attention(Q, K, V):
    d_k = Q.shape[-1]
    scores = Q @ K.T / np.sqrt(d_k)
    weights = np.exp(scores - scores.max(axis=-1, keepdims=True))
    weights /= weights.sum(axis=-1, keepdims=True)
    return weights @ V, weights

seq_len = 8
d_model = 16
X = np.random.randn(seq_len, d_model) * 0.5

out, attn = attention(X, X, X)
print('输入:', X.shape, '输出:', out.shape)
print('注意力矩阵:')
print(attn.round(3))
print('注意力熵:', round(-np.sum(attn[0] * np.log(attn[0] + 1e-10)), 4))

# 位置编码
def pos_encoding(seq_len, d_model):
    pe = np.zeros((seq_len, d_model))
    pos = np.arange(seq_len)[:, None]
    div = np.exp(np.arange(0, d_model, 2) * (-np.log(10000.0)/d_model))
    pe[:, 0::2] = np.sin(pos * div)
    pe[:, 1::2] = np.cos(pos * div)
    return pe

pe = pos_encoding(seq_len, d_model)
print('位置编码:', pe.shape)

print()
print('实验21.1.1完成!')

print('实验21.1.2：Transformer实践')

np.random.seed(42)

def attention(Q, K, V):
    d_k = Q.shape[-1]
    scores = Q @ K.T / np.sqrt(d_k)
    weights = np.exp(scores - scores.max(axis=-1, keepdims=True))
    weights /= weights.sum(axis=-1, keepdims=True)
    return weights @ V, weights

seq_len = 8
d_model = 16
X = np.random.randn(seq_len, d_model) * 0.5

out, attn = attention(X, X, X)
print('输入:', X.shape, '输出:', out.shape)
print('注意力矩阵:')
print(attn.round(3))
print('注意力熵:', round(-np.sum(attn[0] * np.log(attn[0] + 1e-10)), 4))

# 位置编码
def pos_encoding(seq_len, d_model):
    pe = np.zeros((seq_len, d_model))
    pos = np.arange(seq_len)[:, None]
    div = np.exp(np.arange(0, d_model, 2) * (-np.log(10000.0)/d_model))
    pe[:, 0::2] = np.sin(pos * div)
    pe[:, 1::2] = np.cos(pos * div)
    return pe

pe = pos_encoding(seq_len, d_model)

    weights = np.exp(scores - scores.max(axis=-1, keepdims=True))
    weights /= weights.sum(axis=-1, keepdims=True)

seq_len = 8

    weights = np.exp(scores - scores.max(axis=-1, keepdims=True))

print('注意力熵:', round(-np.sum(attn[0] * np.log(attn[0] + 1e-10)), 4))

# 位置编码
def pos_encoding(seq_len, d_model):
    pe = np.zeros((seq_len, d_model))
    pos = np.arange(seq_len)[:, None]
    div = np.exp(np.arange(0, d_model, 2) * (-np.log(10000.0)/d_model))
    pe[:, 0::2] = np.sin(pos * div)
    pe[:, 1::2] = np.cos(pos * div)
    return pe

pe = pos_encoding(seq_len, d_model)
print('位置编码:', pe.shape)

print()
print('实验21.1.8完成!')
实验21.1.9：注意力可视化medium
目标
  • 掌握注意力可视化的核心方法
  • 理解相关算法的数学原理

Python 
# 实验21.1.9：Transformer

import numpy as np

print('='*60)
print('实验21.1.9：Transformer实践')
print('='*60)

np.random.seed(42)

def attention(Q, K, V):
    d_k = Q.shape[-1]
    scores = Q @ K.T / np.sqrt(d_k)
    weights = np.exp(scores - scores.max(axis=-1, keepdims=True))
    weights /= weights.sum(axis=-1, keepdims=True)
    return weights @ V, weights

seq_len = 8
d_model = 16
X = np.random.randn(seq_len, d_model) * 0.5

out, attn = attention(X, X, X)
print('输入:', X.shape, '输出:', out.shape)
print('注意力矩阵:')
print(attn.round(3))
print('注意力熵:', round(-np.sum(attn[0] * np.log(attn[0] + 1e-10)), 4))

# 位置编码
def pos_encoding(seq_len, d_model):
    pe = np.zeros((seq_len, d_model))
    pos = np.arange(seq_len)[:, None]
    div = np.exp(np.arange(0, d_model, 2) * (-np.log(10000.0)/d_model))
    pe[:, 0::2] = np.sin(pos * div)
    pe[:, 1::2] = np.cos(pos * div)
    return pe

pe = pos_encoding(seq_len, d_model)
print('位置编码:', pe.shape)

print()
print('实验21.1.9完成!')

    weights = np.exp(scores - scores.max(axis=-1, keepdims=True))

    div = np.exp(np.arange(0, d_model, 2) * (-np.log(10000.0)/d_model))

import numpy as np

print('实验21.1.11：Transformer实践')
print('='*60)

np.random.seed(42)

def attention(Q, K, V):
    d_k = Q.shape[-1]
    scores = Q @ K.T / np.sqrt(d_k)
    weights = np.exp(scores - scores.max(axis=-1, keepdims=True))
    weights /= weights.sum(axis=-1, keepdims=True)
    return weights @ V, weights

seq_len = 8
d_model = 16
X = np.random.randn(seq_len, d_model) * 0.5

out, attn = attention(X, X, X)
print('输入:', X.shape, '输出:', out.shape)
print('注意力矩阵:')
print(attn.round(3))
print('注意力熵:', round(-np.sum(attn[0] * np.log(attn[0] + 1e-10)), 4))

# 位置编码

    pe = np.zeros((seq_len, d_model))
    pos = np.arange(seq_len)[:, None]
    div = np.exp(np.arange(0, d_model, 2) * (-np.log(10000.0)/d_model))
    pe[:, 0::2] = np.sin(pos * div)
    pe[:, 1::2] = np.cos(pos * div)
    return pe

pe = pos_encoding(seq_len, d_model)

print('实验21.1.14：Transformer实践')

np.random.seed(42)

def attention(Q, K, V):
    d_k = Q.shape[-1]
    scores = Q @ K.T / np.sqrt(d_k)
    weights = np.exp(scores - scores.max(axis=-1, keepdims=True))
    weights /= weights.sum(axis=-1, keepdims=True)
    return weights @ V, weights

seq_len = 8
d_model = 16
X = np.random.randn(seq_len, d_model) * 0.5

out, attn = attention(X, X, X)
print('输入:', X.shape, '输出:', out.shape)

print(attn.round(3))

    pos = np.arange(seq_len)[:, None]
    div = np.exp(np.arange(0, d_model, 2) * (-np.log(10000.0)/d_model))
    pe[:, 0::2] = np.sin(pos * div)
    pe[:, 1::2] = np.cos(pos * div)

Python 
# 实验21.1.15：Transformer

import numpy as np

print('='*60)
print('实验21.1.15：Transformer实践')
print('='*60)

np.random.seed(42)

def attention(Q, K, V):
    d_k = Q.shape[-1]
    scores = Q @ K.T / np.sqrt(d_k)
    weights = np.exp(scores - scores.max(axis=-1, keepdims=True))
    weights /= weights.sum(axis=-1, keepdims=True)
    return weights @ V, weights

seq_len = 8
d_model = 16
X = np.random.randn(seq_len, d_model) * 0.5

out, attn = attention(X, X, X)
print('输入:', X.shape, '输出:', out.shape)
print('注意力矩阵:')
print(attn.round(3))
print('注意力熵:', round(-np.sum(attn[0] * np.log(attn[0] + 1e-10)), 4))

# 位置编码
def pos_encoding(seq_len, d_model):
    pe = np.zeros((seq_len, d_model))
    pos = np.arange(seq_len)[:, None]
    div = np.exp(np.arange(0, d_model, 2) * (-np.log(10000.0)/d_model))
    pe[:, 0::2] = np.sin(pos * div)
    pe[:, 1::2] = np.cos(pos * div)
    return pe

pe = pos_encoding(seq_len, d_model)
print('位置编码:', pe.shape)

print()
print('实验21.1.15完成!')
Self-Attention计算复杂度？
O(n^2*d)。n=序列长度。长序列瓶颈。稀疏/线性Attention改善。
位置编码为什么需要？
Attention不感知位置。需要编码位置信息。正弦编码/可学习编码两种方式。
BERT vs GPT区别？
BERT双向编码+Masked LM适合理解。GPT单向解码+生成适合生成。架构同Transformer。
推荐视频：Transformer教程

深度学习Transformer核心理论实践。

点击观看视频

Transformer

21.2 编码器解码器

实验15题 | 理论3题 | 实验占比83% | 3小时
实验21.2.1：Transformer架构easy
目标

  • 理解相关算法的数学原理
  • 应用于实际ML问题

# 实验21.2.1：Transformer

import numpy as np

print('='*60)
print('实验21.2.1：Transformer实践')
print('='*60)

np.random.seed(42)

def attention(Q, K, V):
    d_k = Q.shape[-1]
    scores = Q @ K.T / np.sqrt(d_k)
    weights = np.exp(scores - scores.max(axis=-1, keepdims=True))
    weights /= weights.sum(axis=-1, keepdims=True)
    return weights @ V, weights

seq_len = 8
d_model = 16
X = np.random.randn(seq_len, d_model) * 0.5

out, attn = attention(X, X, X)
print('输入:', X.shape, '输出:', out.shape)
print('注意力矩阵:')
print(attn.round(3))
print('注意力熵:', round(-np.sum(attn[0] * np.log(attn[0] + 1e-10)), 4))

# 位置编码
def pos_encoding(seq_len, d_model):
    pe = np.zeros((seq_len, d_model))
    pos = np.arange(seq_len)[:, None]
    div = np.exp(np.arange(0, d_model, 2) * (-np.log(10000.0)/d_model))
    pe[:, 0::2] = np.sin(pos * div)
    pe[:, 1::2] = np.cos(pos * div)
    return pe

pe = pos_encoding(seq_len, d_model)
print('位置编码:', pe.shape)

print()
print('实验21.2.1完成!')

print('='*60)

np.random.seed(42)

def attention(Q, K, V):
    d_k = Q.shape[-1]
    scores = Q @ K.T / np.sqrt(d_k)
    weights = np.exp(scores - scores.max(axis=-1, keepdims=True))
    weights /= weights.sum(axis=-1, keepdims=True)
    return weights @ V, weights

seq_len = 8
d_model = 16
X = np.random.randn(seq_len, d_model) * 0.5

out, attn = attention(X, X, X)
print('输入:', X.shape, '输出:', out.shape)
print('注意力矩阵:')
print(attn.round(3))
print('注意力熵:', round(-np.sum(attn[0] * np.log(attn[0] + 1e-10)), 4))

# 位置编码
def pos_encoding(seq_len, d_model):
    pe = np.zeros((seq_len, d_model))
    pos = np.arange(seq_len)[:, None]
    div = np.exp(np.arange(0, d_model, 2) * (-np.log(10000.0)/d_model))
    pe[:, 0::2] = np.sin(pos * div)
    pe[:, 1::2] = np.cos(pos * div)
    return pe

pe = pos_encoding(seq_len, d_model)
print('位置编码:', pe.shape)

print()
print('实验21.2.6完成!')

def attention(Q, K, V):

    scores = Q @ K.T / np.sqrt(d_k)
    weights = np.exp(scores - scores.max(axis=-1, keepdims=True))
    weights /= weights.sum(axis=-1, keepdims=True)
    return weights @ V, weights

seq_len = 8
d_model = 16
X = np.random.randn(seq_len, d_model) * 0.5

out, attn = attention(X, X, X)
print('输入:', X.shape, '输出:', out.shape)
print('注意力矩阵:')
print(attn.round(3))
print('注意力熵:', round(-np.sum(attn[0] * np.log(attn[0] + 1e-10)), 4))

# 位置编码
def pos_encoding(seq_len, d_model):
    pe = np.zeros((seq_len, d_model))
    pos = np.arange(seq_len)[:, None]
    div = np.exp(np.arange(0, d_model, 2) * (-np.log(10000.0)/d_model))
    pe[:, 0::2] = np.sin(pos * div)
    pe[:, 1::2] = np.cos(pos * div)

    weights = np.exp(scores - scores.max(axis=-1, keepdims=True))

    scores = Q @ K.T / np.sqrt(d_k)
    weights = np.exp(scores - scores.max(axis=-1, keepdims=True))
    weights /= weights.sum(axis=-1, keepdims=True)
    return weights @ V, weights

seq_len = 8
d_model = 16

print('输入:', X.shape, '输出:', out.shape)
print('注意力矩阵:')
print(attn.round(3))
print('注意力熵:', round(-np.sum(attn[0] * np.log(attn[0] + 1e-10)), 4))

    pos = np.arange(seq_len)[:, None]
    div = np.exp(np.arange(0, d_model, 2) * (-np.log(10000.0)/d_model))
    pe[:, 0::2] = np.sin(pos * div)
    pe[:, 1::2] = np.cos(pos * div)

import numpy as np

print('='*60)
print('实验21.2.14：Transformer实践')
print('='*60)

np.random.seed(42)

def attention(Q, K, V):
    d_k = Q.shape[-1]
    scores = Q @ K.T / np.sqrt(d_k)
    weights = np.exp(scores - scores.max(axis=-1, keepdims=True))
    weights /= weights.sum(axis=-1, keepdims=True)
    return weights @ V, weights

seq_len = 8
d_model = 16
X = np.random.randn(seq_len, d_model) * 0.5

out, attn = attention(X, X, X)
print('输入:', X.shape, '输出:', out.shape)
print('注意力矩阵:')
print(attn.round(3))
print('注意力熵:', round(-np.sum(attn[0] * np.log(attn[0] + 1e-10)), 4))

# 位置编码

    pe = np.zeros((seq_len, d_model))
    pos = np.arange(seq_len)[:, None]
    div = np.exp(np.arange(0, d_model, 2) * (-np.log(10000.0)/d_model))
    pe[:, 0::2] = np.sin(pos * div)
    pe[:, 1::2] = np.cos(pos * div)

# 实验21.2.15：Transformer

import numpy as np

print('='*60)
print('实验21.2.15：Transformer实践')
print('='*60)

np.random.seed(42)

def attention(Q, K, V):
    d_k = Q.shape[-1]
    scores = Q @ K.T / np.sqrt(d_k)
    weights = np.exp(scores - scores.max(axis=-1, keepdims=True))
    weights /= weights.sum(axis=-1, keepdims=True)
    return weights @ V, weights

seq_len = 8
d_model = 16
X = np.random.randn(seq_len, d_model) * 0.5

out, attn = attention(X, X, X)
print('输入:', X.shape, '输出:', out.shape)
print('注意力矩阵:')
print(attn.round(3))
print('注意力熵:', round(-np.sum(attn[0] * np.log(attn[0] + 1e-10)), 4))

# 位置编码
def pos_encoding(seq_len, d_model):
    pe = np.zeros((seq_len, d_model))
    pos = np.arange(seq_len)[:, None]
    div = np.exp(np.arange(0, d_model, 2) * (-np.log(10000.0)/d_model))
    pe[:, 0::2] = np.sin(pos * div)
    pe[:, 1::2] = np.cos(pos * div)
    return pe

pe = pos_encoding(seq_len, d_model)
print('位置编码:', pe.shape)

print()
print('实验21.2.15完成!')
Self-Attention计算复杂度？
O(n^2*d)。n=序列长度。长序列瓶颈。稀疏/线性Attention改善。
位置编码为什么需要？
Attention不感知位置。需要编码位置信息。正弦编码/可学习编码两种方式。
BERT vs GPT区别？
BERT双向编码+Masked LM适合理解。GPT单向解码+生成适合生成。架构同Transformer。
推荐视频：Transformer教程

深度学习Transformer核心理论实践。

点击观看视频

Transformer

21.3 BERT与GPT

实验15题 | 理论3题 | 实验占比83% | 3小时
实验21.3.1：BERT预训练easy
目标
  • 掌握BERT预训练的核心方法
  • 理解相关算法的数学原理
  • 应用于实际ML问题
要求
  • 编写完整的实现代码
  • 进行结果验证和分析
  • 对比不同方法的性能和效果
Python 
# 实验21.3.1：Transformer

import numpy as np

print('='*60)
print('实验21.3.1：Transformer实践')
print('='*60)

np.random.seed(42)

def attention(Q, K, V):
    d_k = Q.shape[-1]
    scores = Q @ K.T / np.sqrt(d_k)
    weights = np.exp(scores - scores.max(axis=-1, keepdims=True))
    weights /= weights.sum(axis=-1, keepdims=True)
    return weights @ V, weights

seq_len = 8
d_model = 16
X = np.random.randn(seq_len, d_model) * 0.5

out, attn = attention(X, X, X)
print('输入:', X.shape, '输出:', out.shape)
print('注意力矩阵:')
print(attn.round(3))
print('注意力熵:', round(-np.sum(attn[0] * np.log(attn[0] + 1e-10)), 4))

# 位置编码
def pos_encoding(seq_len, d_model):
    pe = np.zeros((seq_len, d_model))
    pos = np.arange(seq_len)[:, None]
    div = np.exp(np.arange(0, d_model, 2) * (-np.log(10000.0)/d_model))
    pe[:, 0::2] = np.sin(pos * div)
    pe[:, 1::2] = np.cos(pos * div)
    return pe

pe = pos_encoding(seq_len, d_model)
print('位置编码:', pe.shape)

print()
print('实验21.3.1完成!')

    scores = Q @ K.T / np.sqrt(d_k)
    weights = np.exp(scores - scores.max(axis=-1, keepdims=True))
    weights /= weights.sum(axis=-1, keepdims=True)

seq_len = 8

    weights = np.exp(scores - scores.max(axis=-1, keepdims=True))
    weights /= weights.sum(axis=-1, keepdims=True)
    return weights @ V, weights

seq_len = 8

    pos = np.arange(seq_len)[:, None]
    div = np.exp(np.arange(0, d_model, 2) * (-np.log(10000.0)/d_model))
    pe[:, 0::2] = np.sin(pos * div)
    pe[:, 1::2] = np.cos(pos * div)

print()
print('实验21.3.3完成!')
实验21.3.4：BERT微调easy
目标
  • 掌握BERT微调的核心方法
  • 理解相关算法的数学原理
  • 应用于实际ML问题
要求
  • 编写完整的实现代码
  • 进行结果验证和分析
  • 对比不同方法的性能和效果
Python 
# 实验21.3.4：Transformer

import numpy as np

print('='*60)
print('实验21.3.4：Transformer实践')
print('='*60)

np.random.seed(42)

def attention(Q, K, V):
    d_k = Q.shape[-1]
    scores = Q @ K.T / np.sqrt(d_k)
    weights = np.exp(scores - scores.max(axis=-1, keepdims=True))
    weights /= weights.sum(axis=-1, keepdims=True)
    return weights @ V, weights

seq_len = 8
d_model = 16
X = np.random.randn(seq_len, d_model) * 0.5

out, attn = attention(X, X, X)
print('输入:', X.shape, '输出:', out.shape)
print('注意力矩阵:')
print(attn.round(3))
print('注意力熵:', round(-np.sum(attn[0] * np.log(attn[0] + 1e-10)), 4))

# 位置编码
def pos_encoding(seq_len, d_model):
    pe = np.zeros((seq_len, d_model))
    pos = np.arange(seq_len)[:, None]
    div = np.exp(np.arange(0, d_model, 2) * (-np.log(10000.0)/d_model))
    pe[:, 0::2] = np.sin(pos * div)
    pe[:, 1::2] = np.cos(pos * div)
    return pe

pe = pos_encoding(seq_len, d_model)
print('位置编码:', pe.shape)

print()
print('实验21.3.4完成!')

print('实验21.3.5：Transformer实践')
print('='*60)

np.random.seed(42)

def attention(Q, K, V):
    d_k = Q.shape[-1]
    scores = Q @ K.T / np.sqrt(d_k)
    weights = np.exp(scores - scores.max(axis=-1, keepdims=True))
    weights /= weights.sum(axis=-1, keepdims=True)
    return weights @ V, weights

seq_len = 8
d_model = 16
X = np.random.randn(seq_len, d_model) * 0.5

out, attn = attention(X, X, X)
print('输入:', X.shape, '输出:', out.shape)
print('注意力矩阵:')
print(attn.round(3))
print('注意力熵:', round(-np.sum(attn[0] * np.log(attn[0] + 1e-10)), 4))

# 位置编码
def pos_encoding(seq_len, d_model):
    pe = np.zeros((seq_len, d_model))
    pos = np.arange(seq_len)[:, None]
    div = np.exp(np.arange(0, d_model, 2) * (-np.log(10000.0)/d_model))
    pe[:, 0::2] = np.sin(pos * div)
    pe[:, 1::2] = np.cos(pos * div)
    return pe

pe = pos_encoding(seq_len, d_model)

    weights = np.exp(scores - scores.max(axis=-1, keepdims=True))

# 实验21.3.15：Transformer

import numpy as np

print('='*60)
print('实验21.3.15：Transformer实践')
print('='*60)

np.random.seed(42)

def attention(Q, K, V):
    d_k = Q.shape[-1]
    scores = Q @ K.T / np.sqrt(d_k)
    weights = np.exp(scores - scores.max(axis=-1, keepdims=True))
    weights /= weights.sum(axis=-1, keepdims=True)
    return weights @ V, weights

seq_len = 8
d_model = 16
X = np.random.randn(seq_len, d_model) * 0.5

out, attn = attention(X, X, X)
print('输入:', X.shape, '输出:', out.shape)
print('注意力矩阵:')
print(attn.round(3))
print('注意力熵:', round(-np.sum(attn[0] * np.log(attn[0] + 1e-10)), 4))

# 位置编码
def pos_encoding(seq_len, d_model):
    pe = np.zeros((seq_len, d_model))
    pos = np.arange(seq_len)[:, None]
    div = np.exp(np.arange(0, d_model, 2) * (-np.log(10000.0)/d_model))
    pe[:, 0::2] = np.sin(pos * div)
    pe[:, 1::2] = np.cos(pos * div)
    return pe

pe = pos_encoding(seq_len, d_model)
print('位置编码:', pe.shape)

print()
print('实验21.3.15完成!')
Self-Attention计算复杂度？
O(n^2*d)。n=序列长度。长序列瓶颈。稀疏/线性Attention改善。
位置编码为什么需要？
Attention不感知位置。需要编码位置信息。正弦编码/可学习编码两种方式。
BERT vs GPT区别？
BERT双向编码+Masked LM适合理解。GPT单向解码+生成适合生成。架构同Transformer。
推荐视频：Transformer教程

深度学习Transformer核心理论实践。

点击观看视频

综合项目

22.1 数据探索EDA

实验15题 | 理论3题 | 实验占比83% | 3小时
实验22.1.1：数据加载easy
目标
  • 掌握数据加载的核心方法
  • 理解相关算法的数学原理
  • 应用于实际ML问题
要求
  • 编写完整的实现代码
  • 进行结果验证和分析
  • 对比不同方法的性能和效果
Python 
# 实验22.1.1：综合项目

import numpy as np

print('='*60)
print('实验22.1.1：综合项目实践')
print('='*60)

np.random.seed(42)

# Step 1: EDA
n = 500
X = np.random.randn(n, 8)
y = 3*X[:,0] - 2*X[:,1] + 1.5*X[:,2] + 4 + np.random.randn(n)*0.5
print('Step1 EDA: n=%d, features=%d, y_mean=%.2f' % (n, X.shape[1], y.mean()))

# Step 2: Preprocessing
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
X_s = StandardScaler().fit_transform(X)
split = int(n * 0.7)
X_tr, X_te = X_s[:split], X_s[split:]
y_tr, y_te = y[:split], y[split:]
print('Step2 Split: train=%d, test=%d' % (len(X_tr), len(X_te)))

# Step 3: Models
# OLS
w_ols = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ols = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ols)**2)
print('Step3 OLS: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ols)

# Ridge
w_ridge = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr + 0.1*np.eye(8)) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ridge = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ridge)**2)
print('Step3 Ridge: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ridge)

# Lasso (coordinate descent)
w_ls = np.zeros(8)
for _ in range(500):
    for j in range(8):
        r = y_tr - X_tr @ w_ls + X_tr[:, j] * w_ls[j]
        p = X_tr[:, j] @ r / len(y_tr)
        w_ls[j] = np.sign(p) * max(0, abs(p) - 0.05)
mse_ls = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ls)**2)
print('Step3 Lasso: MSE=%.4f (%d non-zero)' % (mse_ls, np.sum(w_ls != 0)))

# Step 4: Best model
best = min([(mse_ols,'OLS'),(mse_ridge,'Ridge'),(mse_ls,'Lasso')])
print('Step4 Best: %s (MSE=%.4f)' % best)

print()
print('实验22.1.1完成!')
实验22.1.2：统计分析easy
目标
  • 掌握统计分析的核心方法
  • 理解相关算法的数学原理
  • 应用于实际ML问题
要求
  • 编写完整的实现代码
  • 进行结果验证和分析
  • 对比不同方法的性能和效果
Python 
# 实验22.1.2：综合项目

import numpy as np

print('='*60)
print('实验22.1.2：综合项目实践')
print('='*60)

np.random.seed(42)

# Step 1: EDA
n = 500
X = np.random.randn(n, 8)
y = 3*X[:,0] - 2*X[:,1] + 1.5*X[:,2] + 4 + np.random.randn(n)*0.5
print('Step1 EDA: n=%d, features=%d, y_mean=%.2f' % (n, X.shape[1], y.mean()))

# Step 2: Preprocessing
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
X_s = StandardScaler().fit_transform(X)
split = int(n * 0.7)
X_tr, X_te = X_s[:split], X_s[split:]
y_tr, y_te = y[:split], y[split:]
print('Step2 Split: train=%d, test=%d' % (len(X_tr), len(X_te)))

# Step 3: Models
# OLS
w_ols = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ols = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ols)**2)
print('Step3 OLS: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ols)

# Ridge
w_ridge = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr + 0.1*np.eye(8)) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ridge = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ridge)**2)
print('Step3 Ridge: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ridge)

# Lasso (coordinate descent)
w_ls = np.zeros(8)
for _ in range(500):
    for j in range(8):
        r = y_tr - X_tr @ w_ls + X_tr[:, j] * w_ls[j]
        p = X_tr[:, j] @ r / len(y_tr)
        w_ls[j] = np.sign(p) * max(0, abs(p) - 0.05)
mse_ls = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ls)**2)
print('Step3 Lasso: MSE=%.4f (%d non-zero)' % (mse_ls, np.sum(w_ls != 0)))

# Step 4: Best model
best = min([(mse_ols,'OLS'),(mse_ridge,'Ridge'),(mse_ls,'Lasso')])
print('Step4 Best: %s (MSE=%.4f)' % best)

print()
print('实验22.1.2完成!')

  • 掌握缺失值分析的核心方法
  • 理解相关算法的数学原理

# 实验22.1.3：综合项目

import numpy as np

print('='*60)
print('实验22.1.3：综合项目实践')
print('='*60)

np.random.seed(42)

# Step 1: EDA
n = 500
X = np.random.randn(n, 8)
y = 3*X[:,0] - 2*X[:,1] + 1.5*X[:,2] + 4 + np.random.randn(n)*0.5
print('Step1 EDA: n=%d, features=%d, y_mean=%.2f' % (n, X.shape[1], y.mean()))

# Step 2: Preprocessing
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
X_s = StandardScaler().fit_transform(X)
split = int(n * 0.7)
X_tr, X_te = X_s[:split], X_s[split:]
y_tr, y_te = y[:split], y[split:]
print('Step2 Split: train=%d, test=%d' % (len(X_tr), len(X_te)))

# Step 3: Models
# OLS
w_ols = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ols = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ols)**2)
print('Step3 OLS: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ols)

# Ridge
w_ridge = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr + 0.1*np.eye(8)) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ridge = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ridge)**2)
print('Step3 Ridge: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ridge)

# Lasso (coordinate descent)
w_ls = np.zeros(8)
for _ in range(500):
    for j in range(8):
        r = y_tr - X_tr @ w_ls + X_tr[:, j] * w_ls[j]
        p = X_tr[:, j] @ r / len(y_tr)
        w_ls[j] = np.sign(p) * max(0, abs(p) - 0.05)
mse_ls = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ls)**2)
print('Step3 Lasso: MSE=%.4f (%d non-zero)' % (mse_ls, np.sum(w_ls != 0)))

# Step 4: Best model
best = min([(mse_ols,'OLS'),(mse_ridge,'Ridge'),(mse_ls,'Lasso')])
print('Step4 Best: %s (MSE=%.4f)' % best)

print()
print('实验22.1.3完成!')

# 实验22.1.4：综合项目

import numpy as np

print('='*60)
print('实验22.1.4：综合项目实践')
print('='*60)

np.random.seed(42)

# Step 1: EDA
n = 500
X = np.random.randn(n, 8)
y = 3*X[:,0] - 2*X[:,1] + 1.5*X[:,2] + 4 + np.random.randn(n)*0.5
print('Step1 EDA: n=%d, features=%d, y_mean=%.2f' % (n, X.shape[1], y.mean()))

# Step 2: Preprocessing
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
X_s = StandardScaler().fit_transform(X)
split = int(n * 0.7)
X_tr, X_te = X_s[:split], X_s[split:]
y_tr, y_te = y[:split], y[split:]
print('Step2 Split: train=%d, test=%d' % (len(X_tr), len(X_te)))

# Step 3: Models
# OLS
w_ols = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ols = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ols)**2)
print('Step3 OLS: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ols)

# Ridge
w_ridge = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr + 0.1*np.eye(8)) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ridge = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ridge)**2)
print('Step3 Ridge: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ridge)

# Lasso (coordinate descent)
w_ls = np.zeros(8)
for _ in range(500):
    for j in range(8):
        r = y_tr - X_tr @ w_ls + X_tr[:, j] * w_ls[j]
        p = X_tr[:, j] @ r / len(y_tr)
        w_ls[j] = np.sign(p) * max(0, abs(p) - 0.05)
mse_ls = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ls)**2)
print('Step3 Lasso: MSE=%.4f (%d non-zero)' % (mse_ls, np.sum(w_ls != 0)))

# Step 4: Best model
best = min([(mse_ols,'OLS'),(mse_ridge,'Ridge'),(mse_ls,'Lasso')])
print('Step4 Best: %s (MSE=%.4f)' % best)

print()
print('实验22.1.4完成!')

# 实验22.1.5：综合项目

import numpy as np

print('='*60)
print('实验22.1.5：综合项目实践')
print('='*60)

np.random.seed(42)

# Step 1: EDA
n = 500
X = np.random.randn(n, 8)
y = 3*X[:,0] - 2*X[:,1] + 1.5*X[:,2] + 4 + np.random.randn(n)*0.5
print('Step1 EDA: n=%d, features=%d, y_mean=%.2f' % (n, X.shape[1], y.mean()))

# Step 2: Preprocessing
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
X_s = StandardScaler().fit_transform(X)
split = int(n * 0.7)
X_tr, X_te = X_s[:split], X_s[split:]
y_tr, y_te = y[:split], y[split:]
print('Step2 Split: train=%d, test=%d' % (len(X_tr), len(X_te)))

# Step 3: Models
# OLS
w_ols = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ols = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ols)**2)
print('Step3 OLS: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ols)

# Ridge
w_ridge = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr + 0.1*np.eye(8)) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ridge = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ridge)**2)
print('Step3 Ridge: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ridge)

# Lasso (coordinate descent)
w_ls = np.zeros(8)
for _ in range(500):
    for j in range(8):
        r = y_tr - X_tr @ w_ls + X_tr[:, j] * w_ls[j]
        p = X_tr[:, j] @ r / len(y_tr)
        w_ls[j] = np.sign(p) * max(0, abs(p) - 0.05)
mse_ls = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ls)**2)
print('Step3 Lasso: MSE=%.4f (%d non-zero)' % (mse_ls, np.sum(w_ls != 0)))

# Step 4: Best model
best = min([(mse_ols,'OLS'),(mse_ridge,'Ridge'),(mse_ls,'Lasso')])
print('Step4 Best: %s (MSE=%.4f)' % best)

print()
print('实验22.1.5完成!')

# 实验22.1.6：综合项目

import numpy as np

print('='*60)
print('实验22.1.6：综合项目实践')
print('='*60)

np.random.seed(42)

# Step 1: EDA
n = 500
X = np.random.randn(n, 8)
y = 3*X[:,0] - 2*X[:,1] + 1.5*X[:,2] + 4 + np.random.randn(n)*0.5
print('Step1 EDA: n=%d, features=%d, y_mean=%.2f' % (n, X.shape[1], y.mean()))

# Step 2: Preprocessing
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
X_s = StandardScaler().fit_transform(X)
split = int(n * 0.7)
X_tr, X_te = X_s[:split], X_s[split:]
y_tr, y_te = y[:split], y[split:]
print('Step2 Split: train=%d, test=%d' % (len(X_tr), len(X_te)))

# Step 3: Models
# OLS
w_ols = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ols = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ols)**2)
print('Step3 OLS: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ols)

# Ridge
w_ridge = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr + 0.1*np.eye(8)) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ridge = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ridge)**2)
print('Step3 Ridge: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ridge)

# Lasso (coordinate descent)
w_ls = np.zeros(8)
for _ in range(500):
    for j in range(8):
        r = y_tr - X_tr @ w_ls + X_tr[:, j] * w_ls[j]
        p = X_tr[:, j] @ r / len(y_tr)
        w_ls[j] = np.sign(p) * max(0, abs(p) - 0.05)
mse_ls = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ls)**2)
print('Step3 Lasso: MSE=%.4f (%d non-zero)' % (mse_ls, np.sum(w_ls != 0)))

# Step 4: Best model
best = min([(mse_ols,'OLS'),(mse_ridge,'Ridge'),(mse_ls,'Lasso')])
print('Step4 Best: %s (MSE=%.4f)' % best)

print()
print('实验22.1.6完成!')

# 实验22.1.7：综合项目

import numpy as np

print('='*60)
print('实验22.1.7：综合项目实践')
print('='*60)

np.random.seed(42)

# Step 1: EDA
n = 500
X = np.random.randn(n, 8)
y = 3*X[:,0] - 2*X[:,1] + 1.5*X[:,2] + 4 + np.random.randn(n)*0.5
print('Step1 EDA: n=%d, features=%d, y_mean=%.2f' % (n, X.shape[1], y.mean()))

# Step 2: Preprocessing
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
X_s = StandardScaler().fit_transform(X)
split = int(n * 0.7)
X_tr, X_te = X_s[:split], X_s[split:]
y_tr, y_te = y[:split], y[split:]
print('Step2 Split: train=%d, test=%d' % (len(X_tr), len(X_te)))

# Step 3: Models
# OLS
w_ols = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ols = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ols)**2)
print('Step3 OLS: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ols)

# Ridge
w_ridge = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr + 0.1*np.eye(8)) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ridge = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ridge)**2)
print('Step3 Ridge: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ridge)

# Lasso (coordinate descent)
w_ls = np.zeros(8)
for _ in range(500):
    for j in range(8):
        r = y_tr - X_tr @ w_ls + X_tr[:, j] * w_ls[j]
        p = X_tr[:, j] @ r / len(y_tr)
        w_ls[j] = np.sign(p) * max(0, abs(p) - 0.05)
mse_ls = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ls)**2)
print('Step3 Lasso: MSE=%.4f (%d non-zero)' % (mse_ls, np.sum(w_ls != 0)))

# Step 4: Best model
best = min([(mse_ols,'OLS'),(mse_ridge,'Ridge'),(mse_ls,'Lasso')])
print('Step4 Best: %s (MSE=%.4f)' % best)

print()
print('实验22.1.7完成!')

# 实验22.1.8：综合项目

import numpy as np

print('='*60)
print('实验22.1.8：综合项目实践')
print('='*60)

np.random.seed(42)

# Step 1: EDA
n = 500
X = np.random.randn(n, 8)
y = 3*X[:,0] - 2*X[:,1] + 1.5*X[:,2] + 4 + np.random.randn(n)*0.5
print('Step1 EDA: n=%d, features=%d, y_mean=%.2f' % (n, X.shape[1], y.mean()))

# Step 2: Preprocessing
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
X_s = StandardScaler().fit_transform(X)
split = int(n * 0.7)
X_tr, X_te = X_s[:split], X_s[split:]
y_tr, y_te = y[:split], y[split:]
print('Step2 Split: train=%d, test=%d' % (len(X_tr), len(X_te)))

# Step 3: Models
# OLS
w_ols = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ols = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ols)**2)
print('Step3 OLS: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ols)

# Ridge
w_ridge = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr + 0.1*np.eye(8)) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ridge = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ridge)**2)
print('Step3 Ridge: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ridge)

# Lasso (coordinate descent)
w_ls = np.zeros(8)
for _ in range(500):
    for j in range(8):
        r = y_tr - X_tr @ w_ls + X_tr[:, j] * w_ls[j]
        p = X_tr[:, j] @ r / len(y_tr)
        w_ls[j] = np.sign(p) * max(0, abs(p) - 0.05)
mse_ls = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ls)**2)
print('Step3 Lasso: MSE=%.4f (%d non-zero)' % (mse_ls, np.sum(w_ls != 0)))

# Step 4: Best model
best = min([(mse_ols,'OLS'),(mse_ridge,'Ridge'),(mse_ls,'Lasso')])
print('Step4 Best: %s (MSE=%.4f)' % best)

print()
print('实验22.1.8完成!')

# 实验22.1.9：综合项目

import numpy as np

print('='*60)
print('实验22.1.9：综合项目实践')
print('='*60)

np.random.seed(42)

# Step 1: EDA
n = 500
X = np.random.randn(n, 8)
y = 3*X[:,0] - 2*X[:,1] + 1.5*X[:,2] + 4 + np.random.randn(n)*0.5
print('Step1 EDA: n=%d, features=%d, y_mean=%.2f' % (n, X.shape[1], y.mean()))

# Step 2: Preprocessing
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
X_s = StandardScaler().fit_transform(X)
split = int(n * 0.7)
X_tr, X_te = X_s[:split], X_s[split:]
y_tr, y_te = y[:split], y[split:]
print('Step2 Split: train=%d, test=%d' % (len(X_tr), len(X_te)))

# Step 3: Models
# OLS
w_ols = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ols = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ols)**2)
print('Step3 OLS: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ols)

# Ridge
w_ridge = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr + 0.1*np.eye(8)) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ridge = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ridge)**2)
print('Step3 Ridge: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ridge)

# Lasso (coordinate descent)
w_ls = np.zeros(8)
for _ in range(500):
    for j in range(8):
        r = y_tr - X_tr @ w_ls + X_tr[:, j] * w_ls[j]
        p = X_tr[:, j] @ r / len(y_tr)
        w_ls[j] = np.sign(p) * max(0, abs(p) - 0.05)
mse_ls = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ls)**2)
print('Step3 Lasso: MSE=%.4f (%d non-zero)' % (mse_ls, np.sum(w_ls != 0)))

# Step 4: Best model
best = min([(mse_ols,'OLS'),(mse_ridge,'Ridge'),(mse_ls,'Lasso')])
print('Step4 Best: %s (MSE=%.4f)' % best)

print()
print('实验22.1.9完成!')

# 实验22.1.10：综合项目

import numpy as np

print('='*60)
print('实验22.1.10：综合项目实践')
print('='*60)

np.random.seed(42)

# Step 1: EDA
n = 500
X = np.random.randn(n, 8)
y = 3*X[:,0] - 2*X[:,1] + 1.5*X[:,2] + 4 + np.random.randn(n)*0.5
print('Step1 EDA: n=%d, features=%d, y_mean=%.2f' % (n, X.shape[1], y.mean()))

# Step 2: Preprocessing
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
X_s = StandardScaler().fit_transform(X)
split = int(n * 0.7)
X_tr, X_te = X_s[:split], X_s[split:]
y_tr, y_te = y[:split], y[split:]
print('Step2 Split: train=%d, test=%d' % (len(X_tr), len(X_te)))

# Step 3: Models
# OLS
w_ols = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ols = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ols)**2)
print('Step3 OLS: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ols)

# Ridge
w_ridge = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr + 0.1*np.eye(8)) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ridge = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ridge)**2)
print('Step3 Ridge: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ridge)

# Lasso (coordinate descent)
w_ls = np.zeros(8)
for _ in range(500):
    for j in range(8):
        r = y_tr - X_tr @ w_ls + X_tr[:, j] * w_ls[j]
        p = X_tr[:, j] @ r / len(y_tr)
        w_ls[j] = np.sign(p) * max(0, abs(p) - 0.05)
mse_ls = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ls)**2)
print('Step3 Lasso: MSE=%.4f (%d non-zero)' % (mse_ls, np.sum(w_ls != 0)))

# Step 4: Best model
best = min([(mse_ols,'OLS'),(mse_ridge,'Ridge'),(mse_ls,'Lasso')])
print('Step4 Best: %s (MSE=%.4f)' % best)

print()
print('实验22.1.10完成!')
实验22.1.11：目标定义hard
目标
  • 掌握目标定义的核心方法
  • 理解相关算法的数学原理
  • 应用于实际ML问题
要求
  • 编写完整的实现代码
  • 进行结果验证和分析
  • 对比不同方法的性能和效果
Python 
# 实验22.1.11：综合项目

import numpy as np

print('='*60)
print('实验22.1.11：综合项目实践')
print('='*60)

np.random.seed(42)

# Step 1: EDA
n = 500
X = np.random.randn(n, 8)
y = 3*X[:,0] - 2*X[:,1] + 1.5*X[:,2] + 4 + np.random.randn(n)*0.5
print('Step1 EDA: n=%d, features=%d, y_mean=%.2f' % (n, X.shape[1], y.mean()))

# Step 2: Preprocessing
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
X_s = StandardScaler().fit_transform(X)
split = int(n * 0.7)
X_tr, X_te = X_s[:split], X_s[split:]
y_tr, y_te = y[:split], y[split:]
print('Step2 Split: train=%d, test=%d' % (len(X_tr), len(X_te)))

# Step 3: Models
# OLS
w_ols = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ols = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ols)**2)
print('Step3 OLS: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ols)

# Ridge
w_ridge = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr + 0.1*np.eye(8)) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ridge = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ridge)**2)
print('Step3 Ridge: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ridge)

# Lasso (coordinate descent)
w_ls = np.zeros(8)
for _ in range(500):
    for j in range(8):
        r = y_tr - X_tr @ w_ls + X_tr[:, j] * w_ls[j]
        p = X_tr[:, j] @ r / len(y_tr)
        w_ls[j] = np.sign(p) * max(0, abs(p) - 0.05)
mse_ls = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ls)**2)
print('Step3 Lasso: MSE=%.4f (%d non-zero)' % (mse_ls, np.sum(w_ls != 0)))

# Step 4: Best model
best = min([(mse_ols,'OLS'),(mse_ridge,'Ridge'),(mse_ls,'Lasso')])
print('Step4 Best: %s (MSE=%.4f)' % best)

print()
print('实验22.1.11完成!')
实验22.1.12：评估指标选择hard
目标
  • 掌握评估指标选择的核心方法
  • 理解相关算法的数学原理
  • 应用于实际ML问题
要求
  • 编写完整的实现代码
  • 进行结果验证和分析
  • 对比不同方法的性能和效果
Python 
# 实验22.1.12：综合项目

import numpy as np

print('='*60)
print('实验22.1.12：综合项目实践')
print('='*60)

np.random.seed(42)

# Step 1: EDA
n = 500
X = np.random.randn(n, 8)
y = 3*X[:,0] - 2*X[:,1] + 1.5*X[:,2] + 4 + np.random.randn(n)*0.5
print('Step1 EDA: n=%d, features=%d, y_mean=%.2f' % (n, X.shape[1], y.mean()))

# Step 2: Preprocessing
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
X_s = StandardScaler().fit_transform(X)
split = int(n * 0.7)
X_tr, X_te = X_s[:split], X_s[split:]
y_tr, y_te = y[:split], y[split:]
print('Step2 Split: train=%d, test=%d' % (len(X_tr), len(X_te)))

# Step 3: Models
# OLS
w_ols = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ols = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ols)**2)
print('Step3 OLS: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ols)

# Ridge
w_ridge = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr + 0.1*np.eye(8)) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ridge = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ridge)**2)
print('Step3 Ridge: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ridge)

# Lasso (coordinate descent)
w_ls = np.zeros(8)
for _ in range(500):
    for j in range(8):
        r = y_tr - X_tr @ w_ls + X_tr[:, j] * w_ls[j]
        p = X_tr[:, j] @ r / len(y_tr)
        w_ls[j] = np.sign(p) * max(0, abs(p) - 0.05)
mse_ls = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ls)**2)
print('Step3 Lasso: MSE=%.4f (%d non-zero)' % (mse_ls, np.sum(w_ls != 0)))

# Step 4: Best model
best = min([(mse_ols,'OLS'),(mse_ridge,'Ridge'),(mse_ls,'Lasso')])
print('Step4 Best: %s (MSE=%.4f)' % best)

print()
print('实验22.1.12完成!')

# 实验22.1.13：综合项目

import numpy as np

print('='*60)
print('实验22.1.13：综合项目实践')
print('='*60)

np.random.seed(42)

# Step 1: EDA
n = 500
X = np.random.randn(n, 8)
y = 3*X[:,0] - 2*X[:,1] + 1.5*X[:,2] + 4 + np.random.randn(n)*0.5
print('Step1 EDA: n=%d, features=%d, y_mean=%.2f' % (n, X.shape[1], y.mean()))

# Step 2: Preprocessing
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
X_s = StandardScaler().fit_transform(X)
split = int(n * 0.7)
X_tr, X_te = X_s[:split], X_s[split:]
y_tr, y_te = y[:split], y[split:]
print('Step2 Split: train=%d, test=%d' % (len(X_tr), len(X_te)))

# Step 3: Models
# OLS
w_ols = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ols = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ols)**2)
print('Step3 OLS: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ols)

# Ridge
w_ridge = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr + 0.1*np.eye(8)) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ridge = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ridge)**2)
print('Step3 Ridge: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ridge)

# Lasso (coordinate descent)
w_ls = np.zeros(8)
for _ in range(500):
    for j in range(8):
        r = y_tr - X_tr @ w_ls + X_tr[:, j] * w_ls[j]
        p = X_tr[:, j] @ r / len(y_tr)
        w_ls[j] = np.sign(p) * max(0, abs(p) - 0.05)
mse_ls = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ls)**2)
print('Step3 Lasso: MSE=%.4f (%d non-zero)' % (mse_ls, np.sum(w_ls != 0)))

# Step 4: Best model
best = min([(mse_ols,'OLS'),(mse_ridge,'Ridge'),(mse_ls,'Lasso')])
print('Step4 Best: %s (MSE=%.4f)' % best)

print()
print('实验22.1.13完成!')

# 实验22.1.14：综合项目

import numpy as np

print('='*60)
print('实验22.1.14：综合项目实践')
print('='*60)

np.random.seed(42)

# Step 1: EDA
n = 500
X = np.random.randn(n, 8)
y = 3*X[:,0] - 2*X[:,1] + 1.5*X[:,2] + 4 + np.random.randn(n)*0.5
print('Step1 EDA: n=%d, features=%d, y_mean=%.2f' % (n, X.shape[1], y.mean()))

# Step 2: Preprocessing
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
X_s = StandardScaler().fit_transform(X)
split = int(n * 0.7)
X_tr, X_te = X_s[:split], X_s[split:]
y_tr, y_te = y[:split], y[split:]
print('Step2 Split: train=%d, test=%d' % (len(X_tr), len(X_te)))

# Step 3: Models
# OLS
w_ols = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ols = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ols)**2)
print('Step3 OLS: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ols)

# Ridge
w_ridge = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr + 0.1*np.eye(8)) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ridge = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ridge)**2)
print('Step3 Ridge: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ridge)

# Lasso (coordinate descent)
w_ls = np.zeros(8)
for _ in range(500):
    for j in range(8):
        r = y_tr - X_tr @ w_ls + X_tr[:, j] * w_ls[j]
        p = X_tr[:, j] @ r / len(y_tr)
        w_ls[j] = np.sign(p) * max(0, abs(p) - 0.05)
mse_ls = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ls)**2)
print('Step3 Lasso: MSE=%.4f (%d non-zero)' % (mse_ls, np.sum(w_ls != 0)))

# Step 4: Best model
best = min([(mse_ols,'OLS'),(mse_ridge,'Ridge'),(mse_ls,'Lasso')])
print('Step4 Best: %s (MSE=%.4f)' % best)

print()
print('实验22.1.14完成!')

  • 理解相关算法的数学原理

Python 
# 实验22.1.15：综合项目

import numpy as np

print('='*60)
print('实验22.1.15：综合项目实践')
print('='*60)

np.random.seed(42)

# Step 1: EDA
n = 500
X = np.random.randn(n, 8)
y = 3*X[:,0] - 2*X[:,1] + 1.5*X[:,2] + 4 + np.random.randn(n)*0.5
print('Step1 EDA: n=%d, features=%d, y_mean=%.2f' % (n, X.shape[1], y.mean()))

# Step 2: Preprocessing
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
X_s = StandardScaler().fit_transform(X)
split = int(n * 0.7)
X_tr, X_te = X_s[:split], X_s[split:]
y_tr, y_te = y[:split], y[split:]
print('Step2 Split: train=%d, test=%d' % (len(X_tr), len(X_te)))

# Step 3: Models
# OLS
w_ols = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ols = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ols)**2)
print('Step3 OLS: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ols)

# Ridge
w_ridge = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr + 0.1*np.eye(8)) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ridge = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ridge)**2)
print('Step3 Ridge: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ridge)

# Lasso (coordinate descent)
w_ls = np.zeros(8)
for _ in range(500):
    for j in range(8):
        r = y_tr - X_tr @ w_ls + X_tr[:, j] * w_ls[j]
        p = X_tr[:, j] @ r / len(y_tr)
        w_ls[j] = np.sign(p) * max(0, abs(p) - 0.05)
mse_ls = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ls)**2)
print('Step3 Lasso: MSE=%.4f (%d non-zero)' % (mse_ls, np.sum(w_ls != 0)))

# Step 4: Best model
best = min([(mse_ols,'OLS'),(mse_ridge,'Ridge'),(mse_ls,'Lasso')])
print('Step4 Best: %s (MSE=%.4f)' % best)

print()
print('实验22.1.15完成!')
ML项目关键步骤？
定义问题→数据收集→EDA→预处理→特征工程→建模→评估→部署→监控。
如何进行错误分析？
混淆矩阵→找出最差类别→分析样本特征→改进方向。Ablation实验验证各组件贡献。
MLOps最佳实践？
版本控制(代码+数据+模型)、自动化CI/CD、模型监控(漂移检测)、可复现性、A/B测试。
推荐视频：综合项目教程

深度学习综合项目核心理论实践。

点击观看视频

综合项目

22.2 模型构建

实验15题 | 理论3题 | 实验占比83% | 3小时
实验22.2.1：Baseline建立easy
目标
  • 掌握Baseline建立的核心方法
  • 理解相关算法的数学原理
  • 应用于实际ML问题
要求
  • 编写完整的实现代码
  • 进行结果验证和分析
  • 对比不同方法的性能和效果
Python 
# 实验22.2.1：综合项目

import numpy as np

print('='*60)
print('实验22.2.1：综合项目实践')
print('='*60)

np.random.seed(42)

# Step 1: EDA
n = 500
X = np.random.randn(n, 8)
y = 3*X[:,0] - 2*X[:,1] + 1.5*X[:,2] + 4 + np.random.randn(n)*0.5
print('Step1 EDA: n=%d, features=%d, y_mean=%.2f' % (n, X.shape[1], y.mean()))

# Step 2: Preprocessing
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
X_s = StandardScaler().fit_transform(X)
split = int(n * 0.7)
X_tr, X_te = X_s[:split], X_s[split:]
y_tr, y_te = y[:split], y[split:]
print('Step2 Split: train=%d, test=%d' % (len(X_tr), len(X_te)))

# Step 3: Models
# OLS
w_ols = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ols = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ols)**2)
print('Step3 OLS: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ols)

# Ridge
w_ridge = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr + 0.1*np.eye(8)) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ridge = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ridge)**2)
print('Step3 Ridge: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ridge)

# Lasso (coordinate descent)
w_ls = np.zeros(8)
for _ in range(500):
    for j in range(8):
        r = y_tr - X_tr @ w_ls + X_tr[:, j] * w_ls[j]
        p = X_tr[:, j] @ r / len(y_tr)
        w_ls[j] = np.sign(p) * max(0, abs(p) - 0.05)
mse_ls = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ls)**2)
print('Step3 Lasso: MSE=%.4f (%d non-zero)' % (mse_ls, np.sum(w_ls != 0)))

# Step 4: Best model
best = min([(mse_ols,'OLS'),(mse_ridge,'Ridge'),(mse_ls,'Lasso')])
print('Step4 Best: %s (MSE=%.4f)' % best)

print()
print('实验22.2.1完成!')

# 实验22.2.2：综合项目

import numpy as np

print('='*60)
print('实验22.2.2：综合项目实践')
print('='*60)

np.random.seed(42)

# Step 1: EDA
n = 500
X = np.random.randn(n, 8)
y = 3*X[:,0] - 2*X[:,1] + 1.5*X[:,2] + 4 + np.random.randn(n)*0.5
print('Step1 EDA: n=%d, features=%d, y_mean=%.2f' % (n, X.shape[1], y.mean()))

# Step 2: Preprocessing
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
X_s = StandardScaler().fit_transform(X)
split = int(n * 0.7)
X_tr, X_te = X_s[:split], X_s[split:]
y_tr, y_te = y[:split], y[split:]
print('Step2 Split: train=%d, test=%d' % (len(X_tr), len(X_te)))

# Step 3: Models
# OLS
w_ols = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ols = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ols)**2)
print('Step3 OLS: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ols)

# Ridge
w_ridge = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr + 0.1*np.eye(8)) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ridge = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ridge)**2)
print('Step3 Ridge: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ridge)

# Lasso (coordinate descent)
w_ls = np.zeros(8)
for _ in range(500):
    for j in range(8):
        r = y_tr - X_tr @ w_ls + X_tr[:, j] * w_ls[j]
        p = X_tr[:, j] @ r / len(y_tr)
        w_ls[j] = np.sign(p) * max(0, abs(p) - 0.05)
mse_ls = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ls)**2)
print('Step3 Lasso: MSE=%.4f (%d non-zero)' % (mse_ls, np.sum(w_ls != 0)))

# Step 4: Best model
best = min([(mse_ols,'OLS'),(mse_ridge,'Ridge'),(mse_ls,'Lasso')])
print('Step4 Best: %s (MSE=%.4f)' % best)

print()
print('实验22.2.2完成!')

# 实验22.2.3：综合项目

import numpy as np

print('='*60)
print('实验22.2.3：综合项目实践')
print('='*60)

np.random.seed(42)

# Step 1: EDA
n = 500
X = np.random.randn(n, 8)
y = 3*X[:,0] - 2*X[:,1] + 1.5*X[:,2] + 4 + np.random.randn(n)*0.5
print('Step1 EDA: n=%d, features=%d, y_mean=%.2f' % (n, X.shape[1], y.mean()))

# Step 2: Preprocessing
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
X_s = StandardScaler().fit_transform(X)
split = int(n * 0.7)
X_tr, X_te = X_s[:split], X_s[split:]
y_tr, y_te = y[:split], y[split:]
print('Step2 Split: train=%d, test=%d' % (len(X_tr), len(X_te)))

# Step 3: Models
# OLS
w_ols = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ols = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ols)**2)
print('Step3 OLS: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ols)

# Ridge
w_ridge = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr + 0.1*np.eye(8)) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ridge = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ridge)**2)
print('Step3 Ridge: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ridge)

# Lasso (coordinate descent)
w_ls = np.zeros(8)
for _ in range(500):
    for j in range(8):
        r = y_tr - X_tr @ w_ls + X_tr[:, j] * w_ls[j]
        p = X_tr[:, j] @ r / len(y_tr)
        w_ls[j] = np.sign(p) * max(0, abs(p) - 0.05)
mse_ls = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ls)**2)
print('Step3 Lasso: MSE=%.4f (%d non-zero)' % (mse_ls, np.sum(w_ls != 0)))

# Step 4: Best model
best = min([(mse_ols,'OLS'),(mse_ridge,'Ridge'),(mse_ls,'Lasso')])
print('Step4 Best: %s (MSE=%.4f)' % best)

print()
print('实验22.2.3完成!')

# 实验22.2.4：综合项目

import numpy as np

print('='*60)
print('实验22.2.4：综合项目实践')
print('='*60)

np.random.seed(42)

# Step 1: EDA
n = 500
X = np.random.randn(n, 8)
y = 3*X[:,0] - 2*X[:,1] + 1.5*X[:,2] + 4 + np.random.randn(n)*0.5
print('Step1 EDA: n=%d, features=%d, y_mean=%.2f' % (n, X.shape[1], y.mean()))

# Step 2: Preprocessing
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
X_s = StandardScaler().fit_transform(X)
split = int(n * 0.7)
X_tr, X_te = X_s[:split], X_s[split:]
y_tr, y_te = y[:split], y[split:]
print('Step2 Split: train=%d, test=%d' % (len(X_tr), len(X_te)))

# Step 3: Models
# OLS
w_ols = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ols = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ols)**2)
print('Step3 OLS: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ols)

# Ridge
w_ridge = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr + 0.1*np.eye(8)) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ridge = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ridge)**2)
print('Step3 Ridge: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ridge)

# Lasso (coordinate descent)
w_ls = np.zeros(8)
for _ in range(500):
    for j in range(8):
        r = y_tr - X_tr @ w_ls + X_tr[:, j] * w_ls[j]
        p = X_tr[:, j] @ r / len(y_tr)
        w_ls[j] = np.sign(p) * max(0, abs(p) - 0.05)
mse_ls = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ls)**2)
print('Step3 Lasso: MSE=%.4f (%d non-zero)' % (mse_ls, np.sum(w_ls != 0)))

# Step 4: Best model
best = min([(mse_ols,'OLS'),(mse_ridge,'Ridge'),(mse_ls,'Lasso')])
print('Step4 Best: %s (MSE=%.4f)' % best)

print()
print('实验22.2.4完成!')
实验22.2.5：超参调优medium
目标
  • 掌握超参调优的核心方法
  • 理解相关算法的数学原理
  • 应用于实际ML问题
要求
  • 编写完整的实现代码
  • 进行结果验证和分析
  • 对比不同方法的性能和效果
Python 
# 实验22.2.5：综合项目

import numpy as np

print('='*60)
print('实验22.2.5：综合项目实践')
print('='*60)

np.random.seed(42)

# Step 1: EDA
n = 500
X = np.random.randn(n, 8)
y = 3*X[:,0] - 2*X[:,1] + 1.5*X[:,2] + 4 + np.random.randn(n)*0.5
print('Step1 EDA: n=%d, features=%d, y_mean=%.2f' % (n, X.shape[1], y.mean()))

# Step 2: Preprocessing
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
X_s = StandardScaler().fit_transform(X)
split = int(n * 0.7)
X_tr, X_te = X_s[:split], X_s[split:]
y_tr, y_te = y[:split], y[split:]
print('Step2 Split: train=%d, test=%d' % (len(X_tr), len(X_te)))

# Step 3: Models
# OLS
w_ols = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ols = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ols)**2)
print('Step3 OLS: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ols)

# Ridge
w_ridge = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr + 0.1*np.eye(8)) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ridge = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ridge)**2)
print('Step3 Ridge: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ridge)

# Lasso (coordinate descent)
w_ls = np.zeros(8)
for _ in range(500):
    for j in range(8):
        r = y_tr - X_tr @ w_ls + X_tr[:, j] * w_ls[j]
        p = X_tr[:, j] @ r / len(y_tr)
        w_ls[j] = np.sign(p) * max(0, abs(p) - 0.05)
mse_ls = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ls)**2)
print('Step3 Lasso: MSE=%.4f (%d non-zero)' % (mse_ls, np.sum(w_ls != 0)))

# Step 4: Best model
best = min([(mse_ols,'OLS'),(mse_ridge,'Ridge'),(mse_ls,'Lasso')])
print('Step4 Best: %s (MSE=%.4f)' % best)

print()
print('实验22.2.5完成!')

目标
  • 掌握集成策略的核心方法
  • 理解相关算法的数学原理

# 实验22.2.6：综合项目

import numpy as np

print('='*60)
print('实验22.2.6：综合项目实践')
print('='*60)

np.random.seed(42)

# Step 1: EDA
n = 500
X = np.random.randn(n, 8)
y = 3*X[:,0] - 2*X[:,1] + 1.5*X[:,2] + 4 + np.random.randn(n)*0.5
print('Step1 EDA: n=%d, features=%d, y_mean=%.2f' % (n, X.shape[1], y.mean()))

# Step 2: Preprocessing
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
X_s = StandardScaler().fit_transform(X)
split = int(n * 0.7)
X_tr, X_te = X_s[:split], X_s[split:]
y_tr, y_te = y[:split], y[split:]
print('Step2 Split: train=%d, test=%d' % (len(X_tr), len(X_te)))

# Step 3: Models
# OLS
w_ols = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ols = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ols)**2)
print('Step3 OLS: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ols)

# Ridge
w_ridge = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr + 0.1*np.eye(8)) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ridge = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ridge)**2)
print('Step3 Ridge: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ridge)

# Lasso (coordinate descent)
w_ls = np.zeros(8)
for _ in range(500):
    for j in range(8):
        r = y_tr - X_tr @ w_ls + X_tr[:, j] * w_ls[j]
        p = X_tr[:, j] @ r / len(y_tr)
        w_ls[j] = np.sign(p) * max(0, abs(p) - 0.05)
mse_ls = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ls)**2)
print('Step3 Lasso: MSE=%.4f (%d non-zero)' % (mse_ls, np.sum(w_ls != 0)))

# Step 4: Best model
best = min([(mse_ols,'OLS'),(mse_ridge,'Ridge'),(mse_ls,'Lasso')])
print('Step4 Best: %s (MSE=%.4f)' % best)

print()
print('实验22.2.6完成!')

# 实验22.2.7：综合项目

import numpy as np

print('='*60)
print('实验22.2.7：综合项目实践')
print('='*60)

np.random.seed(42)

# Step 1: EDA
n = 500
X = np.random.randn(n, 8)
y = 3*X[:,0] - 2*X[:,1] + 1.5*X[:,2] + 4 + np.random.randn(n)*0.5
print('Step1 EDA: n=%d, features=%d, y_mean=%.2f' % (n, X.shape[1], y.mean()))

# Step 2: Preprocessing
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
X_s = StandardScaler().fit_transform(X)
split = int(n * 0.7)
X_tr, X_te = X_s[:split], X_s[split:]
y_tr, y_te = y[:split], y[split:]
print('Step2 Split: train=%d, test=%d' % (len(X_tr), len(X_te)))

# Step 3: Models
# OLS
w_ols = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ols = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ols)**2)
print('Step3 OLS: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ols)

# Ridge
w_ridge = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr + 0.1*np.eye(8)) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ridge = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ridge)**2)
print('Step3 Ridge: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ridge)

# Lasso (coordinate descent)
w_ls = np.zeros(8)
for _ in range(500):
    for j in range(8):
        r = y_tr - X_tr @ w_ls + X_tr[:, j] * w_ls[j]
        p = X_tr[:, j] @ r / len(y_tr)
        w_ls[j] = np.sign(p) * max(0, abs(p) - 0.05)
mse_ls = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ls)**2)
print('Step3 Lasso: MSE=%.4f (%d non-zero)' % (mse_ls, np.sum(w_ls != 0)))

# Step 4: Best model
best = min([(mse_ols,'OLS'),(mse_ridge,'Ridge'),(mse_ls,'Lasso')])
print('Step4 Best: %s (MSE=%.4f)' % best)

print()
print('实验22.2.7完成!')

# 实验22.2.8：综合项目

import numpy as np

print('='*60)
print('实验22.2.8：综合项目实践')
print('='*60)

np.random.seed(42)

# Step 1: EDA
n = 500
X = np.random.randn(n, 8)
y = 3*X[:,0] - 2*X[:,1] + 1.5*X[:,2] + 4 + np.random.randn(n)*0.5
print('Step1 EDA: n=%d, features=%d, y_mean=%.2f' % (n, X.shape[1], y.mean()))

# Step 2: Preprocessing
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
X_s = StandardScaler().fit_transform(X)
split = int(n * 0.7)
X_tr, X_te = X_s[:split], X_s[split:]
y_tr, y_te = y[:split], y[split:]
print('Step2 Split: train=%d, test=%d' % (len(X_tr), len(X_te)))

# Step 3: Models
# OLS
w_ols = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ols = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ols)**2)
print('Step3 OLS: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ols)

# Ridge
w_ridge = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr + 0.1*np.eye(8)) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ridge = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ridge)**2)
print('Step3 Ridge: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ridge)

# Lasso (coordinate descent)
w_ls = np.zeros(8)
for _ in range(500):
    for j in range(8):
        r = y_tr - X_tr @ w_ls + X_tr[:, j] * w_ls[j]
        p = X_tr[:, j] @ r / len(y_tr)
        w_ls[j] = np.sign(p) * max(0, abs(p) - 0.05)
mse_ls = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ls)**2)
print('Step3 Lasso: MSE=%.4f (%d non-zero)' % (mse_ls, np.sum(w_ls != 0)))

# Step 4: Best model
best = min([(mse_ols,'OLS'),(mse_ridge,'Ridge'),(mse_ls,'Lasso')])
print('Step4 Best: %s (MSE=%.4f)' % best)

print()
print('实验22.2.8完成!')

# 实验22.2.9：综合项目

import numpy as np

print('='*60)
print('实验22.2.9：综合项目实践')
print('='*60)

np.random.seed(42)

# Step 1: EDA
n = 500
X = np.random.randn(n, 8)
y = 3*X[:,0] - 2*X[:,1] + 1.5*X[:,2] + 4 + np.random.randn(n)*0.5
print('Step1 EDA: n=%d, features=%d, y_mean=%.2f' % (n, X.shape[1], y.mean()))

# Step 2: Preprocessing
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
X_s = StandardScaler().fit_transform(X)
split = int(n * 0.7)
X_tr, X_te = X_s[:split], X_s[split:]
y_tr, y_te = y[:split], y[split:]
print('Step2 Split: train=%d, test=%d' % (len(X_tr), len(X_te)))

# Step 3: Models
# OLS
w_ols = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ols = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ols)**2)
print('Step3 OLS: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ols)

# Ridge
w_ridge = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr + 0.1*np.eye(8)) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ridge = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ridge)**2)
print('Step3 Ridge: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ridge)

# Lasso (coordinate descent)
w_ls = np.zeros(8)
for _ in range(500):
    for j in range(8):
        r = y_tr - X_tr @ w_ls + X_tr[:, j] * w_ls[j]
        p = X_tr[:, j] @ r / len(y_tr)
        w_ls[j] = np.sign(p) * max(0, abs(p) - 0.05)
mse_ls = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ls)**2)
print('Step3 Lasso: MSE=%.4f (%d non-zero)' % (mse_ls, np.sum(w_ls != 0)))

# Step 4: Best model
best = min([(mse_ols,'OLS'),(mse_ridge,'Ridge'),(mse_ls,'Lasso')])
print('Step4 Best: %s (MSE=%.4f)' % best)

print()
print('实验22.2.9完成!')

# 实验22.2.10：综合项目

import numpy as np

print('='*60)
print('实验22.2.10：综合项目实践')
print('='*60)

np.random.seed(42)

# Step 1: EDA
n = 500
X = np.random.randn(n, 8)
y = 3*X[:,0] - 2*X[:,1] + 1.5*X[:,2] + 4 + np.random.randn(n)*0.5
print('Step1 EDA: n=%d, features=%d, y_mean=%.2f' % (n, X.shape[1], y.mean()))

# Step 2: Preprocessing
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
X_s = StandardScaler().fit_transform(X)
split = int(n * 0.7)
X_tr, X_te = X_s[:split], X_s[split:]
y_tr, y_te = y[:split], y[split:]
print('Step2 Split: train=%d, test=%d' % (len(X_tr), len(X_te)))

# Step 3: Models
# OLS
w_ols = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ols = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ols)**2)
print('Step3 OLS: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ols)

# Ridge
w_ridge = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr + 0.1*np.eye(8)) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ridge = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ridge)**2)
print('Step3 Ridge: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ridge)

# Lasso (coordinate descent)
w_ls = np.zeros(8)
for _ in range(500):
    for j in range(8):
        r = y_tr - X_tr @ w_ls + X_tr[:, j] * w_ls[j]
        p = X_tr[:, j] @ r / len(y_tr)
        w_ls[j] = np.sign(p) * max(0, abs(p) - 0.05)
mse_ls = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ls)**2)
print('Step3 Lasso: MSE=%.4f (%d non-zero)' % (mse_ls, np.sum(w_ls != 0)))

# Step 4: Best model
best = min([(mse_ols,'OLS'),(mse_ridge,'Ridge'),(mse_ls,'Lasso')])
print('Step4 Best: %s (MSE=%.4f)' % best)

print()
print('实验22.2.10完成!')

# 实验22.2.11：综合项目

import numpy as np

print('='*60)
print('实验22.2.11：综合项目实践')
print('='*60)

np.random.seed(42)

# Step 1: EDA
n = 500
X = np.random.randn(n, 8)
y = 3*X[:,0] - 2*X[:,1] + 1.5*X[:,2] + 4 + np.random.randn(n)*0.5
print('Step1 EDA: n=%d, features=%d, y_mean=%.2f' % (n, X.shape[1], y.mean()))

# Step 2: Preprocessing
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
X_s = StandardScaler().fit_transform(X)
split = int(n * 0.7)
X_tr, X_te = X_s[:split], X_s[split:]
y_tr, y_te = y[:split], y[split:]
print('Step2 Split: train=%d, test=%d' % (len(X_tr), len(X_te)))

# Step 3: Models
# OLS
w_ols = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ols = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ols)**2)
print('Step3 OLS: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ols)

# Ridge
w_ridge = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr + 0.1*np.eye(8)) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ridge = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ridge)**2)
print('Step3 Ridge: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ridge)

# Lasso (coordinate descent)
w_ls = np.zeros(8)
for _ in range(500):
    for j in range(8):
        r = y_tr - X_tr @ w_ls + X_tr[:, j] * w_ls[j]
        p = X_tr[:, j] @ r / len(y_tr)
        w_ls[j] = np.sign(p) * max(0, abs(p) - 0.05)
mse_ls = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ls)**2)
print('Step3 Lasso: MSE=%.4f (%d non-zero)' % (mse_ls, np.sum(w_ls != 0)))

# Step 4: Best model
best = min([(mse_ols,'OLS'),(mse_ridge,'Ridge'),(mse_ls,'Lasso')])
print('Step4 Best: %s (MSE=%.4f)' % best)

print()
print('实验22.2.11完成!')

# 实验22.2.12：综合项目

import numpy as np

print('='*60)
print('实验22.2.12：综合项目实践')
print('='*60)

np.random.seed(42)

# Step 1: EDA
n = 500
X = np.random.randn(n, 8)
y = 3*X[:,0] - 2*X[:,1] + 1.5*X[:,2] + 4 + np.random.randn(n)*0.5
print('Step1 EDA: n=%d, features=%d, y_mean=%.2f' % (n, X.shape[1], y.mean()))

# Step 2: Preprocessing
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
X_s = StandardScaler().fit_transform(X)
split = int(n * 0.7)
X_tr, X_te = X_s[:split], X_s[split:]
y_tr, y_te = y[:split], y[split:]
print('Step2 Split: train=%d, test=%d' % (len(X_tr), len(X_te)))

# Step 3: Models
# OLS
w_ols = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ols = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ols)**2)
print('Step3 OLS: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ols)

# Ridge
w_ridge = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr + 0.1*np.eye(8)) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ridge = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ridge)**2)
print('Step3 Ridge: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ridge)

# Lasso (coordinate descent)
w_ls = np.zeros(8)
for _ in range(500):
    for j in range(8):
        r = y_tr - X_tr @ w_ls + X_tr[:, j] * w_ls[j]
        p = X_tr[:, j] @ r / len(y_tr)
        w_ls[j] = np.sign(p) * max(0, abs(p) - 0.05)
mse_ls = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ls)**2)
print('Step3 Lasso: MSE=%.4f (%d non-zero)' % (mse_ls, np.sum(w_ls != 0)))

# Step 4: Best model
best = min([(mse_ols,'OLS'),(mse_ridge,'Ridge'),(mse_ls,'Lasso')])
print('Step4 Best: %s (MSE=%.4f)' % best)

print()
print('实验22.2.12完成!')

# 实验22.2.13：综合项目

import numpy as np

print('='*60)
print('实验22.2.13：综合项目实践')
print('='*60)

np.random.seed(42)

# Step 1: EDA
n = 500
X = np.random.randn(n, 8)
y = 3*X[:,0] - 2*X[:,1] + 1.5*X[:,2] + 4 + np.random.randn(n)*0.5
print('Step1 EDA: n=%d, features=%d, y_mean=%.2f' % (n, X.shape[1], y.mean()))

# Step 2: Preprocessing
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
X_s = StandardScaler().fit_transform(X)
split = int(n * 0.7)
X_tr, X_te = X_s[:split], X_s[split:]
y_tr, y_te = y[:split], y[split:]
print('Step2 Split: train=%d, test=%d' % (len(X_tr), len(X_te)))

# Step 3: Models
# OLS
w_ols = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ols = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ols)**2)
print('Step3 OLS: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ols)

# Ridge
w_ridge = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr + 0.1*np.eye(8)) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ridge = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ridge)**2)
print('Step3 Ridge: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ridge)

# Lasso (coordinate descent)
w_ls = np.zeros(8)
for _ in range(500):
    for j in range(8):
        r = y_tr - X_tr @ w_ls + X_tr[:, j] * w_ls[j]
        p = X_tr[:, j] @ r / len(y_tr)
        w_ls[j] = np.sign(p) * max(0, abs(p) - 0.05)
mse_ls = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ls)**2)
print('Step3 Lasso: MSE=%.4f (%d non-zero)' % (mse_ls, np.sum(w_ls != 0)))

# Step 4: Best model
best = min([(mse_ols,'OLS'),(mse_ridge,'Ridge'),(mse_ls,'Lasso')])
print('Step4 Best: %s (MSE=%.4f)' % best)

print()
print('实验22.2.13完成!')
实验22.2.14：版本管理hard
目标
  • 掌握版本管理的核心方法
  • 理解相关算法的数学原理
  • 应用于实际ML问题
要求
  • 编写完整的实现代码
  • 进行结果验证和分析
  • 对比不同方法的性能和效果
Python 
# 实验22.2.14：综合项目

import numpy as np

print('='*60)
print('实验22.2.14：综合项目实践')
print('='*60)

np.random.seed(42)

# Step 1: EDA
n = 500
X = np.random.randn(n, 8)
y = 3*X[:,0] - 2*X[:,1] + 1.5*X[:,2] + 4 + np.random.randn(n)*0.5
print('Step1 EDA: n=%d, features=%d, y_mean=%.2f' % (n, X.shape[1], y.mean()))

# Step 2: Preprocessing
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
X_s = StandardScaler().fit_transform(X)
split = int(n * 0.7)
X_tr, X_te = X_s[:split], X_s[split:]
y_tr, y_te = y[:split], y[split:]
print('Step2 Split: train=%d, test=%d' % (len(X_tr), len(X_te)))

# Step 3: Models
# OLS
w_ols = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ols = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ols)**2)
print('Step3 OLS: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ols)

# Ridge
w_ridge = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr + 0.1*np.eye(8)) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ridge = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ridge)**2)
print('Step3 Ridge: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ridge)

# Lasso (coordinate descent)
w_ls = np.zeros(8)
for _ in range(500):
    for j in range(8):
        r = y_tr - X_tr @ w_ls + X_tr[:, j] * w_ls[j]
        p = X_tr[:, j] @ r / len(y_tr)
        w_ls[j] = np.sign(p) * max(0, abs(p) - 0.05)
mse_ls = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ls)**2)
print('Step3 Lasso: MSE=%.4f (%d non-zero)' % (mse_ls, np.sum(w_ls != 0)))

# Step 4: Best model
best = min([(mse_ols,'OLS'),(mse_ridge,'Ridge'),(mse_ls,'Lasso')])
print('Step4 Best: %s (MSE=%.4f)' % best)

print()
print('实验22.2.14完成!')
实验22.2.15：ML实验管理hard
目标
  • 掌握ML实验管理的核心方法
  • 理解相关算法的数学原理
  • 应用于实际ML问题
要求
  • 编写完整的实现代码
  • 进行结果验证和分析
  • 对比不同方法的性能和效果
Python 
# 实验22.2.15：综合项目

import numpy as np

print('='*60)
print('实验22.2.15：综合项目实践')
print('='*60)

np.random.seed(42)

# Step 1: EDA
n = 500
X = np.random.randn(n, 8)
y = 3*X[:,0] - 2*X[:,1] + 1.5*X[:,2] + 4 + np.random.randn(n)*0.5
print('Step1 EDA: n=%d, features=%d, y_mean=%.2f' % (n, X.shape[1], y.mean()))

# Step 2: Preprocessing
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
X_s = StandardScaler().fit_transform(X)
split = int(n * 0.7)
X_tr, X_te = X_s[:split], X_s[split:]
y_tr, y_te = y[:split], y[split:]
print('Step2 Split: train=%d, test=%d' % (len(X_tr), len(X_te)))

# Step 3: Models
# OLS
w_ols = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ols = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ols)**2)
print('Step3 OLS: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ols)

# Ridge
w_ridge = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr + 0.1*np.eye(8)) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ridge = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ridge)**2)
print('Step3 Ridge: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ridge)

# Lasso (coordinate descent)
w_ls = np.zeros(8)
for _ in range(500):
    for j in range(8):
        r = y_tr - X_tr @ w_ls + X_tr[:, j] * w_ls[j]
        p = X_tr[:, j] @ r / len(y_tr)
        w_ls[j] = np.sign(p) * max(0, abs(p) - 0.05)
mse_ls = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ls)**2)
print('Step3 Lasso: MSE=%.4f (%d non-zero)' % (mse_ls, np.sum(w_ls != 0)))

# Step 4: Best model
best = min([(mse_ols,'OLS'),(mse_ridge,'Ridge'),(mse_ls,'Lasso')])
print('Step4 Best: %s (MSE=%.4f)' % best)

print()
print('实验22.2.15完成!')
ML项目关键步骤？
定义问题→数据收集→EDA→预处理→特征工程→建模→评估→部署→监控。
如何进行错误分析？
混淆矩阵→找出最差类别→分析样本特征→改进方向。Ablation实验验证各组件贡献。
MLOps最佳实践？
版本控制(代码+数据+模型)、自动化CI/CD、模型监控(漂移检测)、可复现性、A/B测试。
推荐视频：综合项目教程

深度学习综合项目核心理论实践。

点击观看视频

综合项目

22.3 部署优化

实验15题 | 理论3题 | 实验占比83% | 3小时

Python 
# 实验22.3.1：综合项目

import numpy as np

print('='*60)
print('实验22.3.1：综合项目实践')
print('='*60)

np.random.seed(42)

# Step 1: EDA
n = 500
X = np.random.randn(n, 8)
y = 3*X[:,0] - 2*X[:,1] + 1.5*X[:,2] + 4 + np.random.randn(n)*0.5
print('Step1 EDA: n=%d, features=%d, y_mean=%.2f' % (n, X.shape[1], y.mean()))

# Step 2: Preprocessing
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
X_s = StandardScaler().fit_transform(X)
split = int(n * 0.7)
X_tr, X_te = X_s[:split], X_s[split:]
y_tr, y_te = y[:split], y[split:]
print('Step2 Split: train=%d, test=%d' % (len(X_tr), len(X_te)))

# Step 3: Models
# OLS
w_ols = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ols = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ols)**2)
print('Step3 OLS: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ols)

# Ridge
w_ridge = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr + 0.1*np.eye(8)) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ridge = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ridge)**2)
print('Step3 Ridge: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ridge)

# Lasso (coordinate descent)
w_ls = np.zeros(8)
for _ in range(500):
    for j in range(8):
        r = y_tr - X_tr @ w_ls + X_tr[:, j] * w_ls[j]
        p = X_tr[:, j] @ r / len(y_tr)
        w_ls[j] = np.sign(p) * max(0, abs(p) - 0.05)
mse_ls = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ls)**2)
print('Step3 Lasso: MSE=%.4f (%d non-zero)' % (mse_ls, np.sum(w_ls != 0)))

# Step 4: Best model
best = min([(mse_ols,'OLS'),(mse_ridge,'Ridge'),(mse_ls,'Lasso')])
print('Step4 Best: %s (MSE=%.4f)' % best)

print()
print('实验22.3.1完成!')

# Step 1: EDA
n = 500

print('Step1 EDA: n=%d, features=%d, y_mean=%.2f' % (n, X.shape[1], y.mean()))

# Step 2: Preprocessing
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
X_s = StandardScaler().fit_transform(X)
split = int(n * 0.7)
X_tr, X_te = X_s[:split], X_s[split:]
y_tr, y_te = y[:split], y[split:]
print('Step2 Split: train=%d, test=%d' % (len(X_tr), len(X_te)))

# Step 3: Models
# OLS
w_ols = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ols = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ols)**2)
print('Step3 OLS: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ols)

# Ridge

mse_ridge = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ridge)**2)
print('Step3 Ridge: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ridge)

# Lasso (coordinate descent)
w_ls = np.zeros(8)
for _ in range(500):
    for j in range(8):
        r = y_tr - X_tr @ w_ls + X_tr[:, j] * w_ls[j]
        p = X_tr[:, j] @ r / len(y_tr)
        w_ls[j] = np.sign(p) * max(0, abs(p) - 0.05)
mse_ls = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ls)**2)
print('Step3 Lasso: MSE=%.4f (%d non-zero)' % (mse_ls, np.sum(w_ls != 0)))

# Step 4: Best model
best = min([(mse_ols,'OLS'),(mse_ridge,'Ridge'),(mse_ls,'Lasso')])

print()

# 实验22.3.3：综合项目

import numpy as np

print('='*60)
print('实验22.3.3：综合项目实践')
print('='*60)

np.random.seed(42)

# Step 1: EDA
n = 500
X = np.random.randn(n, 8)
y = 3*X[:,0] - 2*X[:,1] + 1.5*X[:,2] + 4 + np.random.randn(n)*0.5
print('Step1 EDA: n=%d, features=%d, y_mean=%.2f' % (n, X.shape[1], y.mean()))

# Step 2: Preprocessing
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
X_s = StandardScaler().fit_transform(X)
split = int(n * 0.7)
X_tr, X_te = X_s[:split], X_s[split:]
y_tr, y_te = y[:split], y[split:]
print('Step2 Split: train=%d, test=%d' % (len(X_tr), len(X_te)))

# Step 3: Models
# OLS
w_ols = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ols = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ols)**2)
print('Step3 OLS: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ols)

# Ridge
w_ridge = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr + 0.1*np.eye(8)) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ridge = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ridge)**2)
print('Step3 Ridge: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ridge)

# Lasso (coordinate descent)
w_ls = np.zeros(8)
for _ in range(500):
    for j in range(8):
        r = y_tr - X_tr @ w_ls + X_tr[:, j] * w_ls[j]
        p = X_tr[:, j] @ r / len(y_tr)
        w_ls[j] = np.sign(p) * max(0, abs(p) - 0.05)
mse_ls = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ls)**2)
print('Step3 Lasso: MSE=%.4f (%d non-zero)' % (mse_ls, np.sum(w_ls != 0)))

# Step 4: Best model
best = min([(mse_ols,'OLS'),(mse_ridge,'Ridge'),(mse_ls,'Lasso')])
print('Step4 Best: %s (MSE=%.4f)' % best)

print()
print('实验22.3.3完成!')

# 实验22.3.4：综合项目

import numpy as np

print('='*60)
print('实验22.3.4：综合项目实践')
print('='*60)

np.random.seed(42)

# Step 1: EDA
n = 500
X = np.random.randn(n, 8)
y = 3*X[:,0] - 2*X[:,1] + 1.5*X[:,2] + 4 + np.random.randn(n)*0.5
print('Step1 EDA: n=%d, features=%d, y_mean=%.2f' % (n, X.shape[1], y.mean()))

# Step 2: Preprocessing
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
X_s = StandardScaler().fit_transform(X)
split = int(n * 0.7)
X_tr, X_te = X_s[:split], X_s[split:]
y_tr, y_te = y[:split], y[split:]
print('Step2 Split: train=%d, test=%d' % (len(X_tr), len(X_te)))

# Step 3: Models
# OLS
w_ols = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ols = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ols)**2)
print('Step3 OLS: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ols)

# Ridge
w_ridge = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr + 0.1*np.eye(8)) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ridge = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ridge)**2)
print('Step3 Ridge: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ridge)

# Lasso (coordinate descent)
w_ls = np.zeros(8)
for _ in range(500):
    for j in range(8):
        r = y_tr - X_tr @ w_ls + X_tr[:, j] * w_ls[j]
        p = X_tr[:, j] @ r / len(y_tr)
        w_ls[j] = np.sign(p) * max(0, abs(p) - 0.05)
mse_ls = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ls)**2)
print('Step3 Lasso: MSE=%.4f (%d non-zero)' % (mse_ls, np.sum(w_ls != 0)))

# Step 4: Best model
best = min([(mse_ols,'OLS'),(mse_ridge,'Ridge'),(mse_ls,'Lasso')])
print('Step4 Best: %s (MSE=%.4f)' % best)

print()
print('实验22.3.4完成!')

# 实验22.3.5：综合项目

import numpy as np

print('='*60)
print('实验22.3.5：综合项目实践')
print('='*60)

np.random.seed(42)

# Step 1: EDA
n = 500
X = np.random.randn(n, 8)
y = 3*X[:,0] - 2*X[:,1] + 1.5*X[:,2] + 4 + np.random.randn(n)*0.5
print('Step1 EDA: n=%d, features=%d, y_mean=%.2f' % (n, X.shape[1], y.mean()))

# Step 2: Preprocessing
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
X_s = StandardScaler().fit_transform(X)
split = int(n * 0.7)
X_tr, X_te = X_s[:split], X_s[split:]
y_tr, y_te = y[:split], y[split:]
print('Step2 Split: train=%d, test=%d' % (len(X_tr), len(X_te)))

# Step 3: Models
# OLS
w_ols = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ols = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ols)**2)
print('Step3 OLS: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ols)

# Ridge
w_ridge = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr + 0.1*np.eye(8)) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ridge = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ridge)**2)
print('Step3 Ridge: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ridge)

# Lasso (coordinate descent)
w_ls = np.zeros(8)
for _ in range(500):
    for j in range(8):
        r = y_tr - X_tr @ w_ls + X_tr[:, j] * w_ls[j]
        p = X_tr[:, j] @ r / len(y_tr)
        w_ls[j] = np.sign(p) * max(0, abs(p) - 0.05)
mse_ls = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ls)**2)
print('Step3 Lasso: MSE=%.4f (%d non-zero)' % (mse_ls, np.sum(w_ls != 0)))

# Step 4: Best model
best = min([(mse_ols,'OLS'),(mse_ridge,'Ridge'),(mse_ls,'Lasso')])
print('Step4 Best: %s (MSE=%.4f)' % best)

print()
print('实验22.3.5完成!')

# 实验22.3.6：综合项目

import numpy as np

print('='*60)
print('实验22.3.6：综合项目实践')
print('='*60)

np.random.seed(42)

# Step 1: EDA
n = 500
X = np.random.randn(n, 8)
y = 3*X[:,0] - 2*X[:,1] + 1.5*X[:,2] + 4 + np.random.randn(n)*0.5
print('Step1 EDA: n=%d, features=%d, y_mean=%.2f' % (n, X.shape[1], y.mean()))

# Step 2: Preprocessing
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
X_s = StandardScaler().fit_transform(X)
split = int(n * 0.7)
X_tr, X_te = X_s[:split], X_s[split:]
y_tr, y_te = y[:split], y[split:]
print('Step2 Split: train=%d, test=%d' % (len(X_tr), len(X_te)))

# Step 3: Models
# OLS
w_ols = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ols = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ols)**2)
print('Step3 OLS: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ols)

# Ridge
w_ridge = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr + 0.1*np.eye(8)) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ridge = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ridge)**2)
print('Step3 Ridge: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ridge)

# Lasso (coordinate descent)
w_ls = np.zeros(8)
for _ in range(500):
    for j in range(8):
        r = y_tr - X_tr @ w_ls + X_tr[:, j] * w_ls[j]
        p = X_tr[:, j] @ r / len(y_tr)
        w_ls[j] = np.sign(p) * max(0, abs(p) - 0.05)
mse_ls = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ls)**2)
print('Step3 Lasso: MSE=%.4f (%d non-zero)' % (mse_ls, np.sum(w_ls != 0)))

# Step 4: Best model
best = min([(mse_ols,'OLS'),(mse_ridge,'Ridge'),(mse_ls,'Lasso')])
print('Step4 Best: %s (MSE=%.4f)' % best)

print()
print('实验22.3.6完成!')

# 实验22.3.7：综合项目

import numpy as np

print('='*60)
print('实验22.3.7：综合项目实践')
print('='*60)

np.random.seed(42)

# Step 1: EDA
n = 500
X = np.random.randn(n, 8)
y = 3*X[:,0] - 2*X[:,1] + 1.5*X[:,2] + 4 + np.random.randn(n)*0.5
print('Step1 EDA: n=%d, features=%d, y_mean=%.2f' % (n, X.shape[1], y.mean()))

# Step 2: Preprocessing
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
X_s = StandardScaler().fit_transform(X)
split = int(n * 0.7)
X_tr, X_te = X_s[:split], X_s[split:]
y_tr, y_te = y[:split], y[split:]
print('Step2 Split: train=%d, test=%d' % (len(X_tr), len(X_te)))

# Step 3: Models
# OLS
w_ols = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ols = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ols)**2)
print('Step3 OLS: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ols)

# Ridge
w_ridge = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr + 0.1*np.eye(8)) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ridge = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ridge)**2)
print('Step3 Ridge: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ridge)

# Lasso (coordinate descent)
w_ls = np.zeros(8)
for _ in range(500):
    for j in range(8):
        r = y_tr - X_tr @ w_ls + X_tr[:, j] * w_ls[j]
        p = X_tr[:, j] @ r / len(y_tr)
        w_ls[j] = np.sign(p) * max(0, abs(p) - 0.05)
mse_ls = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ls)**2)
print('Step3 Lasso: MSE=%.4f (%d non-zero)' % (mse_ls, np.sum(w_ls != 0)))

# Step 4: Best model
best = min([(mse_ols,'OLS'),(mse_ridge,'Ridge'),(mse_ls,'Lasso')])
print('Step4 Best: %s (MSE=%.4f)' % best)

print()
print('实验22.3.7完成!')
实验22.3.8：数据漂移检测medium
目标
  • 掌握数据漂移检测的核心方法
  • 理解相关算法的数学原理
  • 应用于实际ML问题
要求
  • 编写完整的实现代码
  • 进行结果验证和分析
  • 对比不同方法的性能和效果
Python 
# 实验22.3.8：综合项目

import numpy as np

print('='*60)
print('实验22.3.8：综合项目实践')
print('='*60)

np.random.seed(42)

# Step 1: EDA
n = 500
X = np.random.randn(n, 8)
y = 3*X[:,0] - 2*X[:,1] + 1.5*X[:,2] + 4 + np.random.randn(n)*0.5
print('Step1 EDA: n=%d, features=%d, y_mean=%.2f' % (n, X.shape[1], y.mean()))

# Step 2: Preprocessing
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
X_s = StandardScaler().fit_transform(X)
split = int(n * 0.7)
X_tr, X_te = X_s[:split], X_s[split:]
y_tr, y_te = y[:split], y[split:]
print('Step2 Split: train=%d, test=%d' % (len(X_tr), len(X_te)))

# Step 3: Models
# OLS
w_ols = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ols = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ols)**2)
print('Step3 OLS: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ols)

# Ridge
w_ridge = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr + 0.1*np.eye(8)) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ridge = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ridge)**2)
print('Step3 Ridge: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ridge)

# Lasso (coordinate descent)
w_ls = np.zeros(8)
for _ in range(500):
    for j in range(8):
        r = y_tr - X_tr @ w_ls + X_tr[:, j] * w_ls[j]
        p = X_tr[:, j] @ r / len(y_tr)
        w_ls[j] = np.sign(p) * max(0, abs(p) - 0.05)
mse_ls = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ls)**2)
print('Step3 Lasso: MSE=%.4f (%d non-zero)' % (mse_ls, np.sum(w_ls != 0)))

# Step 4: Best model
best = min([(mse_ols,'OLS'),(mse_ridge,'Ridge'),(mse_ls,'Lasso')])
print('Step4 Best: %s (MSE=%.4f)' % best)

print()
print('实验22.3.8完成!')

# 实验22.3.9：综合项目

import numpy as np

print('='*60)
print('实验22.3.9：综合项目实践')
print('='*60)

np.random.seed(42)

# Step 1: EDA
n = 500
X = np.random.randn(n, 8)
y = 3*X[:,0] - 2*X[:,1] + 1.5*X[:,2] + 4 + np.random.randn(n)*0.5
print('Step1 EDA: n=%d, features=%d, y_mean=%.2f' % (n, X.shape[1], y.mean()))

# Step 2: Preprocessing
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
X_s = StandardScaler().fit_transform(X)
split = int(n * 0.7)
X_tr, X_te = X_s[:split], X_s[split:]
y_tr, y_te = y[:split], y[split:]
print('Step2 Split: train=%d, test=%d' % (len(X_tr), len(X_te)))

# Step 3: Models
# OLS
w_ols = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ols = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ols)**2)
print('Step3 OLS: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ols)

# Ridge
w_ridge = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr + 0.1*np.eye(8)) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ridge = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ridge)**2)
print('Step3 Ridge: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ridge)

# Lasso (coordinate descent)
w_ls = np.zeros(8)
for _ in range(500):
    for j in range(8):
        r = y_tr - X_tr @ w_ls + X_tr[:, j] * w_ls[j]
        p = X_tr[:, j] @ r / len(y_tr)
        w_ls[j] = np.sign(p) * max(0, abs(p) - 0.05)
mse_ls = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ls)**2)
print('Step3 Lasso: MSE=%.4f (%d non-zero)' % (mse_ls, np.sum(w_ls != 0)))

# Step 4: Best model
best = min([(mse_ols,'OLS'),(mse_ridge,'Ridge'),(mse_ls,'Lasso')])
print('Step4 Best: %s (MSE=%.4f)' % best)

print()
print('实验22.3.9完成!')

# 实验22.3.10：综合项目

import numpy as np

print('='*60)
print('实验22.3.10：综合项目实践')
print('='*60)

np.random.seed(42)

# Step 1: EDA
n = 500
X = np.random.randn(n, 8)
y = 3*X[:,0] - 2*X[:,1] + 1.5*X[:,2] + 4 + np.random.randn(n)*0.5
print('Step1 EDA: n=%d, features=%d, y_mean=%.2f' % (n, X.shape[1], y.mean()))

# Step 2: Preprocessing
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
X_s = StandardScaler().fit_transform(X)
split = int(n * 0.7)
X_tr, X_te = X_s[:split], X_s[split:]
y_tr, y_te = y[:split], y[split:]
print('Step2 Split: train=%d, test=%d' % (len(X_tr), len(X_te)))

# Step 3: Models
# OLS
w_ols = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ols = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ols)**2)
print('Step3 OLS: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ols)

# Ridge
w_ridge = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr + 0.1*np.eye(8)) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ridge = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ridge)**2)
print('Step3 Ridge: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ridge)

# Lasso (coordinate descent)
w_ls = np.zeros(8)
for _ in range(500):
    for j in range(8):
        r = y_tr - X_tr @ w_ls + X_tr[:, j] * w_ls[j]
        p = X_tr[:, j] @ r / len(y_tr)
        w_ls[j] = np.sign(p) * max(0, abs(p) - 0.05)
mse_ls = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ls)**2)
print('Step3 Lasso: MSE=%.4f (%d non-zero)' % (mse_ls, np.sum(w_ls != 0)))

# Step 4: Best model
best = min([(mse_ols,'OLS'),(mse_ridge,'Ridge'),(mse_ls,'Lasso')])
print('Step4 Best: %s (MSE=%.4f)' % best)

print()
print('实验22.3.10完成!')

# 实验22.3.11：综合项目

import numpy as np

print('='*60)
print('实验22.3.11：综合项目实践')
print('='*60)

np.random.seed(42)

# Step 1: EDA
n = 500
X = np.random.randn(n, 8)
y = 3*X[:,0] - 2*X[:,1] + 1.5*X[:,2] + 4 + np.random.randn(n)*0.5
print('Step1 EDA: n=%d, features=%d, y_mean=%.2f' % (n, X.shape[1], y.mean()))

# Step 2: Preprocessing
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
X_s = StandardScaler().fit_transform(X)
split = int(n * 0.7)
X_tr, X_te = X_s[:split], X_s[split:]
y_tr, y_te = y[:split], y[split:]
print('Step2 Split: train=%d, test=%d' % (len(X_tr), len(X_te)))

# Step 3: Models
# OLS
w_ols = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ols = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ols)**2)
print('Step3 OLS: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ols)

# Ridge
w_ridge = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr + 0.1*np.eye(8)) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ridge = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ridge)**2)
print('Step3 Ridge: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ridge)

# Lasso (coordinate descent)
w_ls = np.zeros(8)
for _ in range(500):
    for j in range(8):
        r = y_tr - X_tr @ w_ls + X_tr[:, j] * w_ls[j]
        p = X_tr[:, j] @ r / len(y_tr)
        w_ls[j] = np.sign(p) * max(0, abs(p) - 0.05)
mse_ls = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ls)**2)
print('Step3 Lasso: MSE=%.4f (%d non-zero)' % (mse_ls, np.sum(w_ls != 0)))

# Step 4: Best model
best = min([(mse_ols,'OLS'),(mse_ridge,'Ridge'),(mse_ls,'Lasso')])
print('Step4 Best: %s (MSE=%.4f)' % best)

print()
print('实验22.3.11完成!')

# 实验22.3.12：综合项目

import numpy as np

print('='*60)
print('实验22.3.12：综合项目实践')
print('='*60)

np.random.seed(42)

# Step 1: EDA
n = 500
X = np.random.randn(n, 8)
y = 3*X[:,0] - 2*X[:,1] + 1.5*X[:,2] + 4 + np.random.randn(n)*0.5
print('Step1 EDA: n=%d, features=%d, y_mean=%.2f' % (n, X.shape[1], y.mean()))

# Step 2: Preprocessing
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
X_s = StandardScaler().fit_transform(X)
split = int(n * 0.7)
X_tr, X_te = X_s[:split], X_s[split:]
y_tr, y_te = y[:split], y[split:]
print('Step2 Split: train=%d, test=%d' % (len(X_tr), len(X_te)))

# Step 3: Models
# OLS
w_ols = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ols = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ols)**2)
print('Step3 OLS: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ols)

# Ridge
w_ridge = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr + 0.1*np.eye(8)) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ridge = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ridge)**2)
print('Step3 Ridge: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ridge)

# Lasso (coordinate descent)
w_ls = np.zeros(8)
for _ in range(500):
    for j in range(8):
        r = y_tr - X_tr @ w_ls + X_tr[:, j] * w_ls[j]
        p = X_tr[:, j] @ r / len(y_tr)
        w_ls[j] = np.sign(p) * max(0, abs(p) - 0.05)
mse_ls = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ls)**2)
print('Step3 Lasso: MSE=%.4f (%d non-zero)' % (mse_ls, np.sum(w_ls != 0)))

# Step 4: Best model
best = min([(mse_ols,'OLS'),(mse_ridge,'Ridge'),(mse_ls,'Lasso')])
print('Step4 Best: %s (MSE=%.4f)' % best)

print()
print('实验22.3.12完成!')
