# 实验22.3.13：综合项目

import numpy as np

print('='*60)
print('实验22.3.13：综合项目实践')
print('='*60)

np.random.seed(42)

# Step 1: EDA
n = 500
X = np.random.randn(n, 8)
y = 3*X[:,0] - 2*X[:,1] + 1.5*X[:,2] + 4 + np.random.randn(n)*0.5
print('Step1 EDA: n=%d, features=%d, y_mean=%.2f' % (n, X.shape[1], y.mean()))

# Step 2: Preprocessing
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
X_s = StandardScaler().fit_transform(X)
split = int(n * 0.7)
X_tr, X_te = X_s[:split], X_s[split:]
y_tr, y_te = y[:split], y[split:]
print('Step2 Split: train=%d, test=%d' % (len(X_tr), len(X_te)))

# Step 3: Models
# OLS
w_ols = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ols = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ols)**2)
print('Step3 OLS: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ols)

# Ridge
w_ridge = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr + 0.1*np.eye(8)) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ridge = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ridge)**2)
print('Step3 Ridge: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ridge)

# Lasso (coordinate descent)
w_ls = np.zeros(8)
for _ in range(500):
    for j in range(8):
        r = y_tr - X_tr @ w_ls + X_tr[:, j] * w_ls[j]
        p = X_tr[:, j] @ r / len(y_tr)
        w_ls[j] = np.sign(p) * max(0, abs(p) - 0.05)
mse_ls = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ls)**2)
print('Step3 Lasso: MSE=%.4f (%d non-zero)' % (mse_ls, np.sum(w_ls != 0)))

# Step 4: Best model
best = min([(mse_ols,'OLS'),(mse_ridge,'Ridge'),(mse_ls,'Lasso')])
print('Step4 Best: %s (MSE=%.4f)' % best)

print()
print('实验22.3.13完成!')

# 实验22.3.14：综合项目

import numpy as np

print('='*60)
print('实验22.3.14：综合项目实践')
print('='*60)

np.random.seed(42)

# Step 1: EDA
n = 500
X = np.random.randn(n, 8)
y = 3*X[:,0] - 2*X[:,1] + 1.5*X[:,2] + 4 + np.random.randn(n)*0.5
print('Step1 EDA: n=%d, features=%d, y_mean=%.2f' % (n, X.shape[1], y.mean()))

# Step 2: Preprocessing
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
X_s = StandardScaler().fit_transform(X)
split = int(n * 0.7)
X_tr, X_te = X_s[:split], X_s[split:]
y_tr, y_te = y[:split], y[split:]
print('Step2 Split: train=%d, test=%d' % (len(X_tr), len(X_te)))

# Step 3: Models
# OLS
w_ols = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ols = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ols)**2)
print('Step3 OLS: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ols)

# Ridge
w_ridge = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr + 0.1*np.eye(8)) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ridge = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ridge)**2)
print('Step3 Ridge: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ridge)

# Lasso (coordinate descent)
w_ls = np.zeros(8)
for _ in range(500):
    for j in range(8):
        r = y_tr - X_tr @ w_ls + X_tr[:, j] * w_ls[j]
        p = X_tr[:, j] @ r / len(y_tr)
        w_ls[j] = np.sign(p) * max(0, abs(p) - 0.05)
mse_ls = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ls)**2)
print('Step3 Lasso: MSE=%.4f (%d non-zero)' % (mse_ls, np.sum(w_ls != 0)))

# Step 4: Best model
best = min([(mse_ols,'OLS'),(mse_ridge,'Ridge'),(mse_ls,'Lasso')])
print('Step4 Best: %s (MSE=%.4f)' % best)

print()
print('实验22.3.14完成!')
实验22.3.15：MLOps最佳实践hard
目标
  • 掌握MLOps最佳实践的核心方法
  • 理解相关算法的数学原理
  • 应用于实际ML问题
要求
  • 编写完整的实现代码
  • 进行结果验证和分析
  • 对比不同方法的性能和效果
Python 
# 实验22.3.15：综合项目

import numpy as np

print('='*60)
print('实验22.3.15：综合项目实践')
print('='*60)

np.random.seed(42)

# Step 1: EDA
n = 500
X = np.random.randn(n, 8)
y = 3*X[:,0] - 2*X[:,1] + 1.5*X[:,2] + 4 + np.random.randn(n)*0.5
print('Step1 EDA: n=%d, features=%d, y_mean=%.2f' % (n, X.shape[1], y.mean()))

# Step 2: Preprocessing
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
X_s = StandardScaler().fit_transform(X)
split = int(n * 0.7)
X_tr, X_te = X_s[:split], X_s[split:]
y_tr, y_te = y[:split], y[split:]
print('Step2 Split: train=%d, test=%d' % (len(X_tr), len(X_te)))

# Step 3: Models
# OLS
w_ols = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ols = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ols)**2)
print('Step3 OLS: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ols)

# Ridge
w_ridge = np.linalg.pinv(X_tr.T @ X_tr + 0.1*np.eye(8)) @ X_tr.T @ y_tr
mse_ridge = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ridge)**2)
print('Step3 Ridge: MSE=%.4f' % mse_ridge)

# Lasso (coordinate descent)
w_ls = np.zeros(8)
for _ in range(500):
    for j in range(8):
        r = y_tr - X_tr @ w_ls + X_tr[:, j] * w_ls[j]
        p = X_tr[:, j] @ r / len(y_tr)
        w_ls[j] = np.sign(p) * max(0, abs(p) - 0.05)
mse_ls = np.mean((y_te - X_te @ w_ls)**2)
print('Step3 Lasso: MSE=%.4f (%d non-zero)' % (mse_ls, np.sum(w_ls != 0)))

# Step 4: Best model
best = min([(mse_ols,'OLS'),(mse_ridge,'Ridge'),(mse_ls,'Lasso')])
print('Step4 Best: %s (MSE=%.4f)' % best)

print()
print('实验22.3.15完成!')
ML项目关键步骤？
定义问题→数据收集→EDA→预处理→特征工程→建模→评估→部署→监控。
如何进行错误分析？
混淆矩阵→找出最差类别→分析样本特征→改进方向。Ablation实验验证各组件贡献。
MLOps最佳实践？
版本控制(代码+数据+模型)、自动化CI/CD、模型监控(漂移检测)、可复现性、A/B测试。
